name: =?utf-8?Q?Muthoni=20Wambu=20Kraal?=
subject: DNC Updates and Events [October 19 2020]...
body:
| | | | [ ](https://collegedems.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b3a52587106e5f265f227782b&id=91d8432588&e=d6c5c7d7ec)
---
| | | Dear Friends-
We are just 15 Days from Election Day and it’s official, over [28 million votes](https://collegedems.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b3a52587106e5f265f227782b&id=4065bdd9b2&e=d6c5c7d7ec) have already been cast!
But as BFP Campaign Manager Jen O’Malley Dillon wrote in a recent memo to supporters, “However, the reality is that this race is far closer than some of the punditry we’re seeing on Twitter and on TV would suggest. In the key battleground states where this election will be decided, we remain neck and neck with Donald Trump. In Arizona and North Carolina, for example, polling averages show us just three points ahead. And, if we learned anything from 2016, it’s that we cannot underestimate Donald Trump or his ability to claw his way back into contention in the final days of a campaign, through whatever smears or underhanded tactics he has at his disposal. Nor can we lose sight of the fact that the billionaires who have benefited so handsomely from this administration have been shovelling tens of millions of dollars towards pro-Trump Super PACs, and could very easily erase our financial advantage with the stroke of a pen.”
With that being said, the Trump campaign has just announced that it will spend [$55 million in coordinated ad buys across](https://collegedems.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b3a52587106e5f265f227782b&id=f2d3baa608&e=d6c5c7d7ec) major swing states during the final two weeks of the election. The ads are slated to run in the following states: AZ, IA, NC, WI, MI, NH, ME, OH, and FL. This means we will need as much support as we can amass to counter his likely smear campaign.
In these last few weeks in the campaign, I am asking for your continued help in amplifying credible voting resources like [makeaplan.com](https://collegedems.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b3a52587106e5f265f227782b&id=72899ec7dd&e=d6c5c7d7ec) and [iwillvote.com](https://collegedems.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b3a52587106e5f265f227782b&id=2670487ee8&e=d6c5c7d7ec)\--which I hope you’re all circulating (all the cool kids are doing it).
AND we need your help now with filling critical volunteer roles and virtually deploying staff who can commit for the last 4 to 10 days of the election. So please let me know by responding to this email and cc’ing Atoyia Deans ([deansa@dnc.org](mailto:deansa@dnc.org)) or move them directly to this [late help opportunities](https://collegedems.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b3a52587106e5f265f227782b&id=0316e83958&e=d6c5c7d7ec) link. We still have skilled volunteer holes that need to be filled ASAP.
On the volunteer front, we still have needs for [phone banking](https://collegedems.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b3a52587106e5f265f227782b&id=fa5b36491a&e=d6c5c7d7ec), [text banking](https://collegedems.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b3a52587106e5f265f227782b&id=0f89d1641c&e=d6c5c7d7ec), [voter assistance hotline](https://collegedems.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b3a52587106e5f265f227782b&id=ebdabdbd95&e=d6c5c7d7ec), and [poll observers](https://collegedems.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b3a52587106e5f265f227782b&id=b3d3ef9385&e=d6c5c7d7ec).
* Here is a nifty [phonebanking link tree](https://collegedems.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b3a52587106e5f265f227782b&id=5f82340ba9&e=d6c5c7d7ec) that our intern Alya put together for us! It’s comprehensive and by constituency. Love our interns! Please use it to share out to your networks.

We are also preparing for the third and final Presidential debate that will take place this Thursday. During last week’s town hall on ABC, voters saw there was one leader and one liar. Vice President Biden demonstrated leadership and gave thoughtful answers to voters' questions about COVID-19, taxes, racial equity, climate change, and more. He talked in depth about his policy proposals to reward work, not wealth, and invest in infrastructure and the clean energy jobs. He connected with the voters in the audience and directly addressed their concerns. Vice President Biden’s fundamental character and decency shown through once again. He will bring that same level of decency to this week’s [Presidential debate](https://collegedems.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b3a52587106e5f265f227782b&id=6073eea6ac&e=d6c5c7d7ec), scheduled for Thursday, October 22 at 9PM ET. The topics have been announced (see below) and we’ll be sending more information as it becomes available. An insightful [New York Times Editorial](https://collegedems.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b3a52587106e5f265f227782b&id=0028c767ca&e=d6c5c7d7ec) declared that “Donald Trump’s re-election campaign poses the greatest threat to American democracy since World War II.” I highlight this not to instill fear but to emphasize why this work is so important. The work of volunteers we recruit could be the deciding factor in this election. There must be a clear and undeniable mandate from the voters that this nation must change course if we are to thrive. Yesterday, Biden for President released a[ new ad](https://collegedems.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b3a52587106e5f265f227782b&id=5f15226bdd&e=d6c5c7d7ec) to highlight how Trump’s failed response to the pandemic is shortchanging student-athletes across the nation which will air on ESPN during Monday Night Football. The ad features Tristen Vance, an educational leadership student and football player at Northern Arizona University. And last week the DNC kicked off the release of awesome and informative,[ state-specific voter education videos](https://collegedems.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b3a52587106e5f265f227782b&id=1b0549aa57&e=d6c5c7d7ec) featuring former President Barack Obama, encouraging Americans to visit[ IWillVote.com](https://collegedems.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b3a52587106e5f265f227782b&id=4f63b85bb8&e=d6c5c7d7ec) to learn about options to cast their ballot and to make a plan to vote today. On behalf of myself, this whole team, and Mary (see below) who knows a thing or two about the importance of the 411--I cannot be more proud of the work being done to win this election and to fight for the “soul of the nation!” | **Mary J. Blige Teams Up With IWillvote.com To Encourage People To Vote** October 18, 2020 As November draws near, many prolific singers and artists have lended their voices to encourage all those who feel like the country has left them behind to come together and cast their vote in the name of change.
---

Yours in the Fight,

Mũthoni

In this Update:
* Presidential Debate (Thursday October 22)
* Download the Greenfly App
* Make a Plan to Vote
* Late Help
* Voter Protection Hotline Volunteers
* DNC Disability Council and Voter Protection
* General Volunteer Sign-up
* Download the Vote Joe App
* Text Banking Opportunities
* Phone Banking Opportunities
* Phone Bank Link Tree (By Coalition)
* Visit IWillVote.com / VoyAVotar.com

**PRESIDENTIAL DEBATE**
The last Presidential debate is scheduled for Thursday, October 22 at 9PM ET. There are multiple ways to watch the final debate. Broadcast networks like ABC, NBC, CBS and FOX will air the final debate, as will major cable news networks like FOX News, MSNBC and CNN. It can also be viewed on C-SPAN and streamed online via YouTube and TV streaming apps.
Date: Thursday, October 22
Location: Belmont University in Nashville, TN
Time: 9-10:30 p.m. ET
Moderator: Kristen Welker, NBC News White House correspondent and co-anchor of “Today Weekend”
Topics announced: Fighting Covid-19; American families; Race in America; Climate change; National security; Leadership. Each will get 15 minutes.

**DOWNLOAD GREENFLY APP**
Download the Greenfly app for reliable content to share on social media. When you download the Greenfly app use the code DEMSTEAM to join. Please share these videos on social media and with your networks. We’d like to help as many people as possible find credible information on how to vote, and your voices and networks are so powerful! The easiest way to share these videos is by joining Greenfly.

**MAKE A PLAN TO VOTE**
Voters can learn how to make an effective plan to vote by visiting [makeaplan.com](https://collegedems.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b3a52587106e5f265f227782b&id=567b06ba38&e=d6c5c7d7ec). With so much at stake in this election, it is crucial the voters have the latest information on voting so they can make a plan that is best for them.

**LATE HELP**
The Biden Campaign Late Help team is recruiting volunteers who can commit for the last 4 to 10 days of the election. Volunteers will be matched with states in both in-person and virtual activities.[ Late Help Sign Up Form](https://collegedems.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b3a52587106e5f265f227782b&id=25838a59d6&e=d6c5c7d7ec).

**VOTER PROTECTION HOTLINE & VOLUNTEERS**
The National Voter Protection Hotline has a critical need for multilingual-speaking volunteers. Our phones are ringing off the hook with voters who have questions about the process. They need your help to make a plan to vote for Joe Biden and Democrats up and down the ticket.With your help, we can ensure that all eligible voters are able to exercise their right to vote. Can you answer the call? Sign up for a training [here](https://collegedems.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b3a52587106e5f265f227782b&id=4338097713&e=d6c5c7d7ec) and for a shift [here](https://collegedems.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b3a52587106e5f265f227782b&id=f6f409ff9c&e=d6c5c7d7ec).
Language needed include: Apache; Arabic ; Cantonese; Creole; Filipino/Tagalog; French; Hindi; Hmong; Korean; Mandarin; Navajo; Punjabi; Somali; Spanish; Vietnamese

**DNC DISABILITY COUNCIL AND VOTER PROTECTION**
The DNC Disability Council and Voter Protection program are partnering to expand the accessibility focus of our Election Protection Plans. They are actively recruiting volunteer lawyers, law students and disability advocates (non-attorneys) to join the team. They also need people who are fluent in American Sign Language (ASL). Prospective volunteers can sign up [here](https://collegedems.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b3a52587106e5f265f227782b&id=f60fd860a6&e=d6c5c7d7ec).

**GENERAL VOLUNTEER SIGN-UP**
* [Sign-up Link (English) ](https://collegedems.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b3a52587106e5f265f227782b&id=f6f97b1a5c&e=d6c5c7d7ec)
* [Sign-up Link (Spanish)](https://collegedems.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b3a52587106e5f265f227782b&id=14c9ae769a&e=d6c5c7d7ec)

**DOWNLOAD VOTE JOE APP**
Get out the vote to friends and family by downloading the [Vote Joe app](https://collegedems.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b3a52587106e5f265f227782b&id=f148f5d450&e=d6c5c7d7ec). Through the app you can reach out to your community and provide key voting resources. Please encourage those within your networks to download the app to receive reliable voting information from the Biden campaign.

**TEXT BANKS**
* English training - 2020 Victory National Text Team Training! - Sign up [link](https://collegedems.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b3a52587106e5f265f227782b&id=13c23945d9&e=d6c5c7d7ec)
* Spanish training - Entrenamiento de "Text Mi Gente" (Español) - Sign up[ link](https://collegedems.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b3a52587106e5f265f227782b&id=7b99ef7bcd&e=d6c5c7d7ec)
* Vote Joe Friendbank - Virtual Friend to Friend Outreach Training[ https://www.mobilize.us/2020victory/event/327865/](https://collegedems.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b3a52587106e5f265f227782b&id=d8016136df&e=d6c5c7d7ec)

**PHONE BANK TRAINING** **\- New to Phone Banking? Sign up for a Call Crew Training** :
* English - Dem Dialer (Thru-Talk):[ 2020victory.io/callcrewtraining](https://collegedems.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b3a52587106e5f265f227782b&id=999a37cd6d&e=d6c5c7d7ec)
* Spanish - Entrenamiento de "Llamando Contigo" spanish calling dialer:[ Sign up here](https://collegedems.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b3a52587106e5f265f227782b&id=78e44a85d7&e=d6c5c7d7ec)

**PHONE BANKS - And then make calls from the comfort of your couch:**
* English - Dem Dialer (Thru Talk):[ https://2020victory.io/makecalls](https://collegedems.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b3a52587106e5f265f227782b&id=1c956c659c&e=d6c5c7d7ec)

clean_body: | | | | | | | Dear Friends- We are just 15 Days from Election Day and it’s official, over have already been cast! But as BFP Campaign Manager Jen O’Malley Dillon wrote in a recent memo to supporters, “However, the reality is that this race is far closer than some of the punditry we’re seeing on Twitter and on TV would suggest. In the key battleground states where this election will be decided, we remain neck and neck with Donald Trump. In Arizona and North Carolina, for example, polling averages show us just three points ahead. And, if we learned anything from 2016, it’s that we cannot underestimate Donald Trump or his ability to claw his way back into contention in the final days of a campaign, through whatever smears or underhanded tactics he has at his disposal. Nor can we lose sight of the fact that the billionaires who have benefited so handsomely from this administration have been shovelling tens of millions of dollars towards pro-Trump Super PACs, and could very easily erase our financial advantage with the stroke of a pen.” With that being said, the Trump campaign has just announced that it will spend major swing states during the final two weeks of the election. The ads are slated to run in the following states: AZ, IA, NC, WI, MI, NH, ME, OH, and FL. This means we will need as much support as we can amass to counter his likely smear campaign. In these last few weeks in the campaign, I am asking for your continued help in amplifying credible voting resources like and \--which I hope you’re all circulating (all the cool kids are doing it). AND we need your help now with filling critical volunteer roles and virtually deploying staff who can commit for the last 4 to 10 days of the election. So please let me know by responding to this email and cc’ing Atoyia Deans (mailto:deansa@dnc.org) or move them directly to this link. We still have skilled volunteer holes that need to be filled ASAP. On the volunteer front, we still have needs for , , , and . Here is a nifty that our intern Alya put together for us! It’s comprehensive and by constituency. Love our interns! Please use it to share out to your networks. We are also preparing for the third and final Presidential debate that will take place this Thursday. During last week’s town hall on ABC, voters saw there was one leader and one liar. Vice President Biden demonstrated leadership and gave thoughtful answers to voters' questions about COVID-19, taxes, racial equity, climate change, and more. He talked in depth about his policy proposals to reward work, not wealth, and invest in infrastructure and the clean energy jobs. He connected with the voters in the audience and directly addressed their concerns. Vice President Biden’s fundamental character and decency shown through once again. He will bring that same level of decency to this week’s , scheduled for Thursday, October 22 at 9PM ET. The topics have been announced (see below) and we’ll be sending more information as it becomes available. An insightful declared that “Donald Trump’s re-election campaign poses the greatest threat to American democracy since World War II.” I highlight this not to instill fear but to emphasize why this work is so important. The work of volunteers we recruit could be the deciding factor in this election. There must be a clear and undeniable mandate from the voters that this nation must change course if we are to thrive. Yesterday, Biden for President released a to highlight how Trump’s failed response to the pandemic is shortchanging student-athletes across the nation which will air on ESPN during Monday Night Football. The ad features Tristen Vance, an educational leadership student and football player at Northern Arizona University. And last week the DNC kicked off the release of awesome and informative, featuring former President Barack Obama, encouraging Americans to visit to learn about options to cast their ballot and to make a plan to vote today. On behalf of myself, this whole team, and Mary (see below) who knows a thing or two about the importance of the 411--I cannot be more proud of the work being done to win this election and to fight for the “soul of the nation!” | Mary J. Blige Teams Up With IWillvote.com To Encourage People To Vote October 18, 2020 As November draws near, many prolific singers and artists have lended their voices to encourage all those who feel like the country has left them behind to come together and cast their vote in the name of change. Yours in the Fight, Mũthoni In this Update: Presidential Debate (Thursday October 22) Download the Greenfly App Make a Plan to Vote Late Help Voter Protection Hotline Volunteers DNC Disability Council and Voter Protection General Volunteer Sign-up Download the Vote Joe App Text Banking Opportunities Phone Banking Opportunities Phone Bank Link Tree (By Coalition) Visit IWillVote.com / VoyAVotar.com PRESIDENTIAL DEBATE The last Presidential debate is scheduled for Thursday, October 22 at 9PM ET. There are multiple ways to watch the final debate. Broadcast networks like ABC, NBC, CBS and FOX will air the final debate, as will major cable news networks like FOX News, MSNBC and CNN. It can also be viewed on C-SPAN and streamed online via YouTube and TV streaming apps. Date: Thursday, October 22 Location: Belmont University in Nashville, TN Time: 9-10:30 p.m. ET Moderator: Kristen Welker, NBC News White House correspondent and co-anchor of “Today Weekend” Topics announced: Fighting Covid-19; American families; Race in America; Climate change; National security; Leadership. Each will get 15 minutes. DOWNLOAD GREENFLY APP Download the Greenfly app for reliable content to share on social media. When you download the Greenfly app use the code DEMSTEAM to join. Please share these videos on social media and with your networks. We’d like to help as many people as possible find credible information on how to vote, and your voices and networks are so powerful! The easiest way to share these videos is by joining Greenfly. MAKE A PLAN TO VOTE Voters can learn how to make an effective plan to vote by visiting . With so much at stake in this election, it is crucial the voters have the latest information on voting so they can make a plan that is best for them. LATE HELP The Biden Campaign Late Help team is recruiting volunteers who can commit for the last 4 to 10 days of the election. Volunteers will be matched with states in both in-person and virtual activities.. VOTER PROTECTION HOTLINE & VOLUNTEERS The National Voter Protection Hotline has a critical need for multilingual-speaking volunteers. Our phones are ringing off the hook with voters who have questions about the process. They need your help to make a plan to vote for Joe Biden and Democrats up and down the ticket.With your help, we can ensure that all eligible voters are able to exercise their right to vote. Can you answer the call? Sign up for a training and for a shift . Language needed include: Apache; Arabic ; Cantonese; Creole; Filipino/Tagalog; French; Hindi; Hmong; Korean; Mandarin; Navajo; Punjabi; Somali; Spanish; Vietnamese DNC DISABILITY COUNCIL AND VOTER PROTECTION The DNC Disability Council and Voter Protection program are partnering to expand the accessibility focus of our Election Protection Plans. They are actively recruiting volunteer lawyers, law students and disability advocates (non-attorneys) to join the team. They also need people who are fluent in American Sign Language (ASL). Prospective volunteers can sign up . GENERAL VOLUNTEER SIGN-UP DOWNLOAD VOTE JOE APP Get out the vote to friends and family by downloading the . Through the app you can reach out to your community and provide key voting resources. Please encourage those within your networks to download the app to receive reliable voting information from the Biden campaign. name: Judicial Watch
subject: Get Tom Fitton’s new book - Available Today!
body:
Never in America have we witnessed a more serious conspiracy than the lawless assault on our nation by the Left in collaboration with the Deep State to open our borders without restriction, corrupt our electoral process and bring down the Trump administration.

| |
---
|
---
|
---
| Dear Fellow American,

**Tom Fitton 's new book - _A Republic Under Assault_** : **_The Left 's Ongoing Attack on American Freedom_ - **is out today!
If you haven't already ordered your copy, we encourage you to **_[order it now](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=51773&L=19477&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaGJvb2suY29tLz91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPTIwMTgwNDE2JnV0bV90ZXJtPUFjdGl2ZSZ1dG1fY29udGVudD0yMDIwMTAyMDA3MTgwMQ==)_**.
Or join Tom Fitton online for his **_[Live Signing event](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=51773&L=20881&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly9wcmVtaWVyZWNvbGxlY3RpYmxlcy5jb20vcmVwdWJsaWM/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj0yMDE4MDQxNiZ1dG1fdGVybT1BY3RpdmUmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9MjAyMDEwMjAwNzE4MDE=)_** today, Tuesday, October 20th at 3 PM ET and **_[order a signed copy](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=51773&L=20881&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly9wcmVtaWVyZWNvbGxlY3RpYmxlcy5jb20vcmVwdWJsaWM/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj0yMDE4MDQxNiZ1dG1fdGVybT1BY3RpdmUmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9MjAyMDEwMjAwNzE4MDE=)_**!
In this explosive new book, Tom explains how the Radical Left and the Deep State are trying to destroy the Trump presidency and identifies the four major forces posing a continued threat to American democracy, including:

* **Deep State Efforts to Destroy the Trump Presidency: **The documents that show senior officials in the Obama administration, with the approval of Barack Obama, spied on the Trump presidential campaign AND President Trump! The dirty secrets of Obamagate and the impeachment/coup attack are exposed!

* **Hillary Clinton Email Scandal:** How Hillary Clinton, her top aides, and senior officials at the Obama State Department conspired to cover-up Hillary Clinton's secret email system--and shocking new docs that tie Obama White House to the cover-up!

* **Voter Fraud:** How Soros-funded groups attack states that seek to protect clean elections by challenging voter ID laws, and how the Left is cynically peddling COVID-19 crisis electoral "reforms," like mail-in voting, which could increase voter fraud and election chaos.

* **Illegal Immigration** : How deadly and illegal "sanctuary" policies are exploding across America, and how our nation's sovereignty has been under assault by radical open border advocates.

Today one of their main targets is President Donald J. Trump.
Tomorrow it could be you and anyone who believes in the US Constitution, believes the United States must have clearly defined and protected borders, believes in the need for a strong military, believes in the value of hard work and faith, and believes in the rule of law and American exceptionalism.
Subversive Deep State collaborators with ties to the Clinton and Obama machines not only launched countless--often illegal--operations to stop and then remove Trump, but even more alarmingly, are working to transform the United States into something truly unrecognizable to all who believe in liberty and the rule of law.
**_[If you haven't already ordered your copy -get it now _!_](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=51773&L=19477&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaGJvb2suY29tLz91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPTIwMTgwNDE2JnV0bV90ZXJtPUFjdGl2ZSZ1dG1fY29udGVudD0yMDIwMTAyMDA3MTgwMQ==)_**
Thank you for your support!
Sincerely,
Judicial Watch
P.S. And don't forget, you can join Tom Fitton during his **_[Live Signing Online Event](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=51773&L=20881&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly9wcmVtaWVyZWNvbGxlY3RpYmxlcy5jb20vcmVwdWJsaWM/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj0yMDE4MDQxNiZ1dG1fdGVybT1BY3RpdmUmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9MjAyMDEwMjAwNzE4MDE=)_** today, Tuesday, October 20th from 3-4 PM and hear Tom talk about the book and **_[order you signed copy](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=51773&L=20881&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly9wcmVtaWVyZWNvbGxlY3RpYmxlcy5jb20vcmVwdWJsaWM/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj0yMDE4MDQxNiZ1dG1fdGVybT1BY3RpdmUmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9MjAyMDEwMjAwNzE4MDE=)_**!

name: Rob Portman
subject: Will you help my friend Steve?
body:
He really needs you.
No images? [Click here](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-e-jujylrjl-kujkulhluu-o/) [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jujylrjl-kujkulhluu-r/) Friend, In the last few weeks, my friend and colleague in the House Steve Chabot has been weathering millions of dollars in false, negative attacks from Nancy Pelosi and her network of outside groups.Pelosi will stop at nothing to defeat Steve Chabot, a proven fighter for small businesses and Ohio families, and elect his opponent Kate Schroder, who will be a reliable vote for a dangerous, far-left agenda.Friend, Steve's opponent even said "nothing else matters" but a far-left climate agenda, including the socialist Green New Deal, while our state battles a pandemic.**[Will you join me in helping my friend Steve counter the baseless attacks from out-of-state groups who want to elect a far-left ally?](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jujylrjl-kujkulhluu-y/)** I want to provide Steve with a list of Ohioans who SHOWED UP and STEPPED UP to help keep him fight for common sense results for Ohio families. name: True the Vote
subject: We've got something NEW to announce....
body:
Pray the Vote is launching today!
| | | | [](https://truethevote.acemlnb.com/lt.php?s=8bd62f454a89069e58200a8ac4751d38&i=270A592A20A2692)
---
| | Friend,
This is the most important election of our lifetime. Our election processes are being tested like never before. That's why True the Vote is encouraging everyone to vote, to volunteer, and to pray for the well-being of those involved in the election process – voters, election workers, mail carriers, media, organizers, activists, candidates, and anyone else involved in supporting this historic vote.

Today, we're excited to announce that we've joined forces with Intercessors for America (IFA), to launch the [Pray the Vote Project](https://truethevote.acemlnb.com/lt.php?s=8bd62f454a89069e58200a8ac4751d38&i=270A592A20A2702), the largest interactive election prayer initiative in history.
Pray the Vote will guide Americans to unite in prayer for the election through an engaging online experience, including an interactive map displaying ballot processing center locations across the nation.
---
| | [](https://truethevote.acemlnb.com/lt.php?s=8bd62f454a89069e58200a8ac4751d38&i=270A592A20A2704)
---
| | Through Pray the Vote, we're empowering all Americans to faithfully pray everyday for this election, for our leaders, and for all the men and women who are working so hard to support a free and fair process under extraordinarily difficult circumstances.
---
| | [ LEARN MORE ](https://truethevote.acemlnb.com/lt.php?s=8bd62f454a89069e58200a8ac4751d38&i=270A592A20A2702)
---
| | |
---
| |
---
| | We'll kick things off as True the Vote joins Intercessors for America for a live webcast today at 11:15 am CT / 12:15 pm ET. Watch here: [www.ifapray.org/live](https://truethevote.acemlnb.com/lt.php?s=8bd62f454a89069e58200a8ac4751d38&i=270A592A20A2703). Or dial (712) 775-7431, 2452# to join via conference call.
---
| | [ JOIN THE WEBCAST ](https://truethevote.acemlnb.com/lt.php?s=8bd62f454a89069e58200a8ac4751d38&i=270A592A20A2705)
---
| | ****_Do not be anxious about anything, but in every situation, by prayer and petition, with thanksgiving, present your requests to God. And the peace of God, which transcends all understanding, will guard your hearts and your minds in Christ Jesus._**** ****_—Philippians 4:6-7_****
**_Join us over the next few weeks to pray for the most important election of our lifetime._ **
Onward! The True the Vote Team
---
| |
---
|
---
| | Join the conversation on social:
---
| | | | [](https://truethevote.acemlnb.com/lt.php?s=8bd62f454a89069e58200a8ac4751d38&i=270A592A20A2696) | | [](https://truethevote.acemlnb.com/lt.php?s=8bd62f454a89069e58200a8ac4751d38&i=270A592A20A2697) | | [](https://truethevote.acemlnb.com/lt.php?s=8bd62f454a89069e58200a8ac4751d38&i=270A592A20A2698) | | [](https://truethevote.acemlnb.com/lt.php?s=8bd62f454a89069e58200a8ac4751d38&i=270A592A20A2699)
---|---|---|---|---|---|---
| | Copyright © 2020 True the Vote, All rights reserved
---
| | True The Vote, PO Box 3109 #19128, Houston, TX 77253-3109, United States
[Click here to unsubscribe](https://truethevote.acemlnb.com/proc.php?nl=20&c=270&m=592&s=8bd62f454a89069e58200a8ac4751d38&act=unsub)

Peter,
---
The media told Republicans to give up on winning Virginia, but YOU ignored them. You chose to put your faith in our campaign to defeat Mark Warner.
---
Thanks to your steadfast support, FEC reports show that we OUTRAISED Mark Warner $2.5 million to $2.3 million during the 3rd quarter.
---
In 2014, Warner outraised Gillespie by over $9 MILLION -- and only won by 16,727 votes.

_WE _CAN_ WIN THIS RACE._

---
War taught me to NEVER surrender.
---
Even during the most hopeless moments on the battlefield, I never gave up hope.

Peter,
Help welcome Joe Biden to Tennessee!
There will be opportunities to volunteer with the Biden for President campaign on the day of the 3rd and final Presidential debate on Thursday, 10/22. If you are in the Nashville area and would like to volunteer to support the campaign, please click here [https://docs.google.com/forms/d/e/1FAIpQLScTmG6-tKLK0-csCOWItip5NBd6rtpbODWrf2mbJaTC3T5Qow/viewform?vc=0&c=0&w=1&flr=0] to sign up.

Peter,
We are in the final stretch. It’s hard to believe it but we only have two weeks until Election Day.
We’re trying to raise money ASAP to make sure we can place all of the digital ads we need to help candidates and get out the vote (GOTV) before Facebook’s cutoff for new political ads. Facebook changed their policy and will not be allowing any new ads to go up starting a week before Election Day. Those placed prior, however, will be allowed to stay live through the election.
Reaching the record number of newly registered Tennessee voters is critical, and we believe this is the most efficient way to do just that. Can you donate today, and help us reach as many voters as we can before the Facebook deadline? [http://secure.ngpvan.com/tJLKn-4F5Ee9e7tBzzVl5A2]

Thank you,
[https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP07/1/77134/images/signature2.png]
--
Mary Mancini
Chair, Tennessee Democratic Party

[](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0015HxHpiSLAuR7n7zo1zkSRC92KoVV-4EjPMqwQFjz9-eiGQCPIdDFDFR9uD1AtVyVwdJd-AWt5tm4pk0SKbYiD4Iezi0c_3d6h8lXV0PaiGgyijEoPeCILatPUkVenmsvdH2Ao0m557JYd2rHYSFgkFAzgdBXq8zGPC5t6JtwS8OhhNo63XmYr_fWtzO_iCQAsYZElfuWDVk-xLRXtTHDspVWSfgGCEqBsymoeyKONIH4QYQHeyaszkxLgpJfGHksejwWvDaD24ysdjI-TFhnQlTSeiAkTR2AunaaCDMW-zVOfWABcFfdUa9VP1O3TTHTwJ4CEqFSqHJfDn1yCOeFh6ZhBLB6yEWrK-PCsW17v1BARxxYIrqYuPXPJycRKfZMfFuUSyOEoijBY5wyjCYOwokFlVwJ4lvuQHPAvTPfZlWcTD26WHJO3pgAYsYrPLLHpVE3uxOr7snSRspUDwxOQ0ixjG4f9nPyBxRlBSxhSFuCs7__8FnZL2wCEVz8eyiN&c=RZNCdFZJyVGi0rLZSqJ-ODfX73EXT86mx548cM1hSpOeaf7CxdvdNw==&ch=Ou6WcRYAcOrb1Rn9kEXxKBJKcYoZye7AgnYJi82MfpInP9uuQO0sWA==) Gina Jones is too radical for TX-23, Friend.

Here are the facts:
* _She doesn 't live in TX-23 and has hardly been seen in the district in months._
* _She 's teaming up with the far-left mob to spend millions against me and spread lies._
* _She supported closing TX military bases. _
* _She 's 100% in favor of Medicare for All, the Green New Deal, abortion on demand, and defunding the police._

**She 's not for TX-23 - she's for the D.C. swamp.**

**[KEEP THIS SEAT FOR THE GOP -> DONATE](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0015HxHpiSLAuR7n7zo1zkSRC92KoVV-4EjPMqwQFjz9-eiGQCPIdDFDFR9uD1AtVyVwdJd-AWt5tm4pk0SKbYiD4Iezi0c_3d6h8lXV0PaiGgyijEoPeCILatPUkVenmsvdH2Ao0m557JYd2rHYSFgkFAzgdBXq8zGPC5t6JtwS8OhhNo63XmYr_fWtzO_iCQAsYZElfuWDVk-xLRXtTHDspVWSfgGCEqBsymoeyKONIH4QYQHeyaszkxLgpJfGHksejwWvDaD24ysdjI-TFhnQlTSeiAkTR2AunaaCDMW-zVOfWABcFfdUa9VP1O3TTHTwJ4CEqFSqHJfDn1yCOeFh6ZhBLB6yEWrK-PCsW17v1BARxxYIrqYuPXPJycRKfZMfFuUSyOEoijBY5wyjCYOwokFlVwJ4lvuQHPAvTPfZlWcTD26WHJO3pgAYsYrPLLHpVE3uxOr7snSRspUDwxOQ0ixjG4f9nPyBxRlBSxhSFuCs7__8FnZL2wCEVz8eyiN&c=RZNCdFZJyVGi0rLZSqJ-ODfX73EXT86mx548cM1hSpOeaf7CxdvdNw==&ch=Ou6WcRYAcOrb1Rn9kEXxKBJKcYoZye7AgnYJi82MfpInP9uuQO0sWA==)**
She's spending millions to spread lies about me and my record and it's time we set the record straight:
* _I will ALWAYS protect pre-existing conditions._
* _I support TX values -- hard work, faith, and family -- not D.C. values._
* _I 'll fight to protect our veterans and make sure they get the care they deserve._

name: John Jackson
subject: losing momentum
body:
Friend, It has been a good week for our liberal opponents in California and New York.
First, we found out Hollywood Hegar raised over $13 million in the third quarter.
Second, our race was DOWNGRADED by the Cook Political Report.
THIRD, the DSCC decided NOW was the perfect time to begin their SEVEN FIGURE AD BUY right here in our CONSERVATIVE Texas.
Friend, their plan with that SEVEN FIGURE BUY?

• TV ads to air across the state • Field organizing and door knockers to garner UNDECIDED votes for MJ

John Jackson, Team Cornyn Paid for by the Cornyn Majority Texas, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and composed of Texans for Senator John Cornyn Inc., Alamo PAC, and the Republican Party of Texas. Cornyn Majority Texas
228 South Washington Street, Suite 115, Alexandria, VA 22314 CORNYN MAJORITY TEXAS DISCLAIMER

The CORNYN MAJORITY TEXAS (JFC) is a joint fundraising committee composed of: Texans for Senator John Cornyn Inc., Alamo PAC, Republican Party of Texas, and NRSC (each individually, a Committee and collectively, the Committees). Contributions or gifts to JFC, or any participating Committee individually, are not deductible as charitable contributions for federal income tax purposes.

All contributions permissible under FECA, but which would cause a contributor to exceed any applicable Federal contribution limit to a specific Committee, shall be reallocated to the remaining Committees according to this allocation formula to the extent permitted by FECA. Any contribution that would otherwise cause a contributor to exceed any applicable Federal contribution limit or that is otherwise impermissible under FECA shall be refunded to the contributor. Any contributor may designate his or her contribution to a specific participating Committee, to the extent permissible by FECA. Any contributor may make his or her contribution directly payable to any Committee participating in JFC. Any such designated contribution that causes the contributor to exceed the contribution limit to the designated Committee shall not be reallocated by JFC absent the prior written permission of the contributor as required by law.

Contributions from corporations, foreign nationals (without green cards), federal government contractors, and other federally impermissible sources are prohibited. No contributions to the NRSC Headquarters Account or the NRSC Legal Fund will be used to influence any federal election.

The maximum an individual or a federal non-multicandidate political committee may contribute to JFC is $266,300. The maximum amount a federal multi-candidate political action committee may contribute to JFC is $120,000. Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, mailing address, occupation, and name of employer of each individual whose aggregate contributions exceed $200 in an election cycle or calendar year, as applicable.

Contributions to JFC shall be allocated as follows:

1. The first $2,800 from any single individuals contribution shall go to the Texans for Senator John Cornyn Inc. general election account. The next $10,000 shall go to the Republican Party of Texas. The next $5,000 shall go to Alamo PAC. The next $35,500 shall go to the NRSC. The next $106,500 shall go to the NRSC Headquarters Account. Any remaining funds up to $106,500 shall go to the NRSC Legal Fund.
2. The first $5,600 from any joint individual contribution shall go to the Texans for Senator John Cornyn Inc. general election account. The next $20,000 shall go to the Republican Party of Texas. The next $10,000 shall go to Alamo PAC. The next $71,000 shall go to the NRSC. The next $213,000 shall go to the NRSC Headquarters Account. Any remaining funds from a joint individual contribution up to $213,000 shall go to the NRSC Legal Fund.
3. The first $2,800 from any federal non-multicandidate PAC shall go to the Texans for Senator John Cornyn Inc. general election account. The next $10,000 shall go to the Republican Party of Texas. The next $5,000 shall go to Alamo PAC. The next $35,500 shall go to the NRSC. The next $106,500 shall go to the NRSC Headquarters Account. Any remaining funds up to $106,500 shall go to the NRSC Legal Fund.
4. The first $5,000 from any federal multicandidate PAC contribution shall go to the Texans for Senator John Cornyn Inc. general election account. The next $5,000 shall go to the Republican Party of Texas. The next $5,000 shall go to the Alamo PAC. The next $15,000 shall go to the NRSC. The next $45,000 shall go to the NRSC Headquarters Account. Any remaining funds from a federal multicandidate PAC contribution up to $45,000 shall go to the NRSC Legal Fund.

The contributors signature shall serve as written designation of his or her contribution to the particular elections described above. With you on board, we're one step closer to keeping Texas red and fighting to create a future we can all be proud of. On behalf of all of us, we're glad you're on board. Now that you're on Team Cornyn, make sure that you're keeping up to date with the latest news. The best way to do so? Following our campaign on [Facebook](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001rGLTqwpi84danYBbeW4tjAQADK0kqoVmIuIqodH9nLhslV6ebpqqCZW6vviNJznYMyDwXFO1iGUouWbWP1OTdWsRCuBAlXHI3uTIMaerIeu0HNCjx70k4ewKj64y7D8H_fDYn-N07t3nPMtE2P9gjwGmryGfOMdwy634Y5y8c7I=&c=eV0TsI592PRdWRxG4SozC29ZpyHMPexKsbkTW-w_-bmz4CqHBBlE4A==&ch=jP6ue6z9NFxTBmZ92uP6oylw7dK3iKzDxTvuVd6jRHAVKylPu8MDYg==) and [Twitter](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001rGLTqwpi84danYBbeW4tjAQADK0kqoVmIuIqodH9nLhslV6ebpqqCXv-tgzX173e1CPsxb2yKWnsGTKNp7K0sKrbllbGR1rPZh8ab_8FYMI1oEYbcyHzA-M171cjRusmffc_pqu28ksEDeIVl1mgFPXOcZC-e2-b&c=eV0TsI592PRdWRxG4SozC29ZpyHMPexKsbkTW-w_-bmz4CqHBBlE4A==&ch=jP6ue6z9NFxTBmZ92uP6oylw7dK3iKzDxTvuVd6jRHAVKylPu8MDYg==) that way you'll always be the first to know when something important comes up. Now, if you're still reading this, we know you're really ready to stand up and protect Texas. To aid your fight, we suggest you turn [this song](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001rGLTqwpi84danYBbeW4tjAQADK0kqoVmIuIqodH9nLhslV6ebpqqCZW6vviNJznY4OC3fhsnd2lDraiZbdPbGUnHcTKUj17533grm66siej69S7NNAcORRfTiPw1Ac6yluogvJlFKKwCsDOqg_zDbJj2qCKmPCcnAuWtB1ng4j8TrobqjgK2-Q==&c=eV0TsI592PRdWRxG4SozC29ZpyHMPexKsbkTW-w_-bmz4CqHBBlE4A==&ch=jP6ue6z9NFxTBmZ92uP6oylw7dK3iKzDxTvuVd6jRHAVKylPu8MDYg==) up on full volume and do anything you can to help stop the dangerous policies being pedaled by the left to oppose our president and replace our conservative Texas values. Once you're pumped up and ready to go, head over to our [volunteer page](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001rGLTqwpi84danYBbeW4tjAQADK0kqoVmIuIqodH9nLhslV6ebpqqCa01tl_LxgY6KkicazrshmnRqtQbyJBmt8SHiX6PQItZ4cpSPL0oWvBnQdcEzn11GXtTvxlfPAoBcLG_o-e_u60IxSlPAConxwtG-C-XNjisuVO6icZXsIDgL9e8mfzkUPhrjzBnDdKEWum8JodaKwHpogzGsJnDoKvfnjWmTY9bIA42bhjQGOhFU5zmb9O8MQV1_muyDp1JU6RT_BLwNF1RxteV9GXPRoQwfR8D3LvsRulus61FH6Bn6nvXhD-vJg==&c=eV0TsI592PRdWRxG4SozC29ZpyHMPexKsbkTW-w_-bmz4CqHBBlE4A==&ch=jP6ue6z9NFxTBmZ92uP6oylw7dK3iKzDxTvuVd6jRHAVKylPu8MDYg==) and find out exactly how you can help. We'd be proud to have you join us. Thank you for all you do to support John Cornyn for Senate.Together, we can protect this great state we know and love, and promote a safe, prosperous, and healthy Texas. body:
We're just two short weeks away from the most critical election in our lifetime.
Friend,

We're just two short weeks away from the most critical election in our lifetime. With the radical Left posting record fundraising numbers, I need your help to fight back NOW.

_**If everyone reading this email donated just $5, you could make a significant difference in my fight to help vulnerable Republicans in key battleground races this year.**_

[**CHIP IN $5 RIGHT NOW**](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001o_wOOQ3n1XRju1KS-Bbi0K9vNvdq0DehNWy4viDbRwN9Z27lhrXC1Fz2Lud4XPVH8HZC9p3djnfZ2j0qMlawZOCUIUMOREtS3wl31bfh-YfPgqkHDm3CncLtc9O3ElpyFEVCjuyopsntvgzILdhUri0ypfbDN0UPluaSK1lFZS11j_IT6d9YTvaRHWTM6kB7MJhMcwAtlux0pgkWN5bonsjz4yaTcuAPGO0gBdXzQm2HxT4RMHGBYE50d3lHM6y8ZFe8UsbLQvphkhgfLGXN5SWSiXkrw3BUSrC79ma5njDhUBMnsAF82u_W3Cd81O7KDuB9LfGZ4lH36h7iK2g3_w9fZcTGfmt656UfPMlDk-pvEfN8SjfofGSs8OilR8T_-E4UeldyxG4UO8xLfZhQ6OUrFXcpb4qprxGJeSeQyFoncQPyyE-G4w==&c=B0WVPpIgmReFEwhp0UxIoJp-JeH062moUgSWc0IkrpntjzyHlWJvPA==&ch=BGq7dtNVP_P0hoKwUo-jP9PMtTpq7hx5eIyTfpyCnOsTISjzrqfMNw==)

As a United States Marine, I vowed to never leave a man behind. My fight to save the Senate this year means dedicating all of our resources to critical races like Iowa, Colorado, North Carolina, and Arizona. These are the radical Left's TOP targets in 2020, and without your help right now, each is in grave danger of turning BLUE.

Friend, I know we have been asking a lot lately, but if you could just chip in $5 today, it would really make a difference.

[**CHIP IN $5 RIGHT NOW**](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001o_wOOQ3n1XRju1KS-Bbi0K9vNvdq0DehNWy4viDbRwN9Z27lhrXC1Fz2Lud4XPVH8HZC9p3djnfZ2j0qMlawZOCUIUMOREtS3wl31bfh-YfPgqkHDm3CncLtc9O3ElpyFEVCjuyopsntvgzILdhUri0ypfbDN0UPluaSK1lFZS11j_IT6d9YTvaRHWTM6kB7MJhMcwAtlux0pgkWN5bonsjz4yaTcuAPGO0gBdXzQm2HxT4RMHGBYE50d3lHM6y8ZFe8UsbLQvphkhgfLGXN5SWSiXkrw3BUSrC79ma5njDhUBMnsAF82u_W3Cd81O7KDuB9LfGZ4lH36h7iK2g3_w9fZcTGfmt656UfPMlDk-pvEfN8SjfofGSs8OilR8T_-E4UeldyxG4UO8xLfZhQ6OUrFXcpb4qprxGJeSeQyFoncQPyyE-G4w==&c=B0WVPpIgmReFEwhp0UxIoJp-JeH062moUgSWc0IkrpntjzyHlWJvPA==&ch=BGq7dtNVP_P0hoKwUo-jP9PMtTpq7hx5eIyTfpyCnOsTISjzrqfMNw==)

Todd Young

| Peter,
I wanted to let you in on some Team Trump campaign events going on in Northwest Florida. Today and tomorrow, I'll be on the Team Trump On Tour Bus Tour, and I want to see you at one of the events.
We need Patriots like you to turn out and show their support for President Trump. A huge red wave is about to overtake Florida, and we need to show the country just how excited we are for 4 more years of President Trump.
---
|
---
| Here is the full schedule of events over the next few days:
TUESDAY, OCTOBER 20th
1:45 PM CT - MAGA MEET UP Location: Walton County Field Office Address: 130 Scenic Gulf Dr., Miramar Beach, FL 32550
5:00 PM CT - MAGA MEET UP Location: AJ's on the Bayou Address: 200 Eglin Pkwy NE, Fort Walton Beach, FL 32547
WEDNESDAY, OCTOBER 21
1:15 PM CT - MAGA MEET UP Location: The Fish House Address: 600 S Barracks St, Pensacola, FL 32502

Hope to see you out on the trail!
---
|
---
| Matt Gaetz

name: Heidi Sieck - Vote Prochoice
subject: TIMELY: here's how to protect Roe v Wade and honor RBG
disclaimer_text: paid for by Democrats
body:
If you are having trouble viewing this message or would like to share it on a social network, you can [view the message online](http://votedem.org/mail/util.cfm?gpiv=2100163432.546276.610&gen=1).
| [](http://votedem.org/mail/util.cfm?mailaction=clickthru&gpiv=2100163432.546276.610&gen=1&mailing_linkid=15996)
---
| Dear Friend, Last month, we lost a titan of gender justice and a champion for reproductive freedom in Ruth Bader Ginsburg. Today, Justice Ginsburg's legacy and Roe v Wade are in more danger than ever before. [**The only solution is to vote for prochoice candidates running at every level.**](http://votedem.org/mail/util.cfm?mailaction=clickthru&gpiv=2100163432.546276.610&gen=1&mailing_linkid=15997) [](http://votedem.org/mail/util.cfm?mailaction=clickthru&gpiv=2100163432.546276.610&gen=1&mailing_linkid=15997) In addition to providing prochoice recommendations, [this guide also features endorsements from over 160+ other organizations](http://votedem.org/mail/util.cfm?mailaction=clickthru&gpiv=2100163432.546276.610&gen=1&mailing_linkid=15997) so you have everything you need to vote your values. From city hall to state houses, we must elect new leadership that reflects the will of the people -- especially as 77% of Americans agree that Roe v Wade must not be overturned. If you have any questions about the voting process, or you encounter any issues, please call the Election Protection Hotline at 866-OUR-VOTE. Thank you for being a prochoice voter.
Heidi Sieck
#VOTEPROCHOICE The #VOTEPROCHOICE Voter Guide is provided as part of the press coverage of Democrats.com LLC through its projects act.tv, Unite Blue, #VOTEPROCHOICE and other Democrats.com LLC platforms. Democrats.com LLC is the original online news and community site for progressive activists. #
We are two weeks out from Election Day. It’s hard to believe.

Thanks to small dollar donors like you, we are in a strong position to win this election. Our field game is as strong as ever, we’re smashing fundraising goals left and right, and our digital strategy is bringing in new voters every day.

I am extremely grateful that so many of you stepped up last week and helped us hit our mid-October FEC fundraising goal. But now that we are in the final stretch, with 14 days to go, **I need you to double down on your investment in this campaign.**

[With two weeks left, can I count on you to chip in $14?](https://daniforillinois.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=16d8d19eb3a417b5b09061c0d&id=e463870fb9&e=140a9b81e7)

name: Marco Rubio
subject: They’re beating us.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Marco Rubio for Senate
body:
**2 weeks.** That's all we have left until the most critical election of our lifetime. But, right now, we're behind.

Democrats' fundraising efforts are miles ahead of ours right now. In the last three months alone, they outraised us by **TENS of MILLIONS.** Last month, after the Supreme Court seat opened up, Democrats raised $100 million in 24 hours. Rest assured, if these trends continue, we will lose. _**Badly.**_

[_**Will you help Senate Republicans catch up by rushing in an immediate contribution to help defend our Majority? To combat the onslaught of liberal dollars coming into South Carolina, Team Graham has set up an , and we're asking for conservative patriots like you to help us fight back! | | | | | | | It could be the $57 million Jaime Harrison has raised in the last three months - or the $60 million he's spent to attack Senator Graham , but this poll clearly suggests the race is CLOSE. body:

[](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001ZWpba6clASbK6d_Ii7K7kdsoMbiRDIXV3JF6G5_WdmD8CnStYlsAdSTisp1hmI-5BiyMc4370094pnhRyqi6saLhQUAYkP0YTlKKL8WRTQmSKNA0T-MvJMJ5AiU_9vaEBxop_6U4ntIJjDA5UVKUWe00-na3AYmwrXdhsrdFywv64UpO43p1cl4jvyICRXvJ2JpLf1MOsJnizzbEW7nWnkNNKCUs6IBHtVKoCFTbGH3vDVw5glJ3e5_qzF0LcZpaFqoOCoT1q2QgnfqPvSjvZu0BMpBEzh-JEosIUK1LM0f4SCVDskBg5ZMjG4l1lKNb8jZypjxlo3l6c7oyNHC9BRDcGFvY-aGg53rzw5BEVTB-8Aek2UkPi1OeQr3RJbop2PfZb7eeShN3hNDWMr6oIYqYYtBPbYoHFgaBEuzinnM=&c=qi_FRaftBAFrYfbJpkUTtGrse2Qw5qHwh6BNjoGDndT6A1PWYBn9FA==&ch=RsAAjzx0U7OCuzkZmloBvztjymq6BRSyOV-pCSFHsZhUDCIZuXZLTQ==)
Hi Friend, _**We are officially 2 weeks away from one of the most critical elections of our lifetime.**_ Our team already knows that Stephanie is the best choice for this district. In Congress, you can bet she will always put you first and...
* Stand up for teachers and OK education
* Take care of our veterans and senior citizens
* Improve healthcare while reducing costs
* Support President Trump and the America First Agenda
* Protect your 2nd Amendment rights
* Secure the border from illegal immigration
* Defend the lives of the unborn
* Strengthen our military and defense

With the Democrats in power in the Nancy Pelosi-led House, our government has never been more divided. What is the Republican State Leadership Committee (RSLC)?
We are the only organization solely focused on electing Republicans to down-ballot, state-level offices. We accomplish this by working directly with Republican leadership in the states and providing them with resources, training, and funding. We have nearly 200,000 donors in all 50 states. Your support is critical to making this happen. You can learn more about us at RSLC.GOP.

name: My Faith Votes
subject: The Messiah will not arrive on Air Force One
body:
| | Peter, As the November election approaches many Christians, maybe even you, are asking the question, “Who do I vote for?” In the film, **_Trump 2024: The World After Trump_** leading evangelical, Catholic, and conservative leaders like our own Honorary National Chairman Mike Huckabee, and Dennis Prager, Eric Metaxas, and Franklin Graham offer a biblical perspective on the Oval Office and what Christians should consider when they cast their votes. [](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=4OZBS21H-paGbhCruNaUVgjUuM6u3AUsIBik5TC75p4&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e201020com01&n=1) **You can rent or purchase the movie**[**here**](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=4OZBS21H-paGbhCruNaUVgjUuM6u3AUsIBik5TC75p4&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e201020com01&n=2).**When you use the discount code,_Vote20_ , you will receive 20% off your purchase.** Pastor Jack Hibbs says in this explosive new documentary, “Jesus Christ is not on the ballot. He never will be. The Messiah will not arrive on Air Force One. Can God use flawed leaders because if God cannot use flawed leaders then who is He going to use?” **As Christians, we don’t vote based on personality or party affiliation. We vote for principles and according to the Word of God.** Watch or order your copy of [**_Trump 2024: The World After Trump_**](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=4OZBS21H-paGbhCruNaUVgjUuM6u3AUsIBik5TC75p4&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e201020com01&n=3) today and learn from national Christian leaders on what’s really at stake during this critical time in our country. **Pray. Think. Vote.** [](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=FvZODUdzRCV4_QVEoUI5Y_LYDGbWPUdf00keax2EMv8&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e201020com01&n=4)
---
* * *
You subscribed [dpwillis67@gmail.com](mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com) to receive email updates from My Faith Votes. Our goal is to provide valuable content that equips you to prayerfully and thoughtfully take action in the public square. To update your subscription preferences or unsubscribe, click below.

[Update Subscription Preferences or Unsubscribe](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/unsubscribe?e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e201020com01&n=5)

name: YG Nyghtstorm
subject: You’ve never seen a billboard like this
disclaimer_text: Paid for by God, Guns & Life PAC
body:
[ ](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0011_PdEnTfCmiFx5f1gn3BhMYtQO-hjVAjGHOWnV9KbgvQrZ1yjpa1my6Nq-tOXtv9iNgNP1ARrvXa3JavS9qW-2mSBglKtM0w7q6UCN9_DxBmpaUzR6XMT_lAiKyrQ5My0VezlgQ7nHaKkqQaKUv3MXr79qRHGp9P8eien3L97JIl7JS8xG6M45rksvFH5JPdXnqcY6PoX2Q=&c=w7PBoEPGB4Wld5_3ru3q6nJODiskNI3UfVwURxXefTotiffXM41KxA==&ch=BCcGyeHAc1vR__MUf5wJA0M_yr5TZl8qKTNzlDo6OL4r1ODOGpdRwQ==) Dear fellow American,
My name is YG Nyghtstorm.
I’m a 6’ 2”, gun-toting, pro-life, Trump-supporting BLACK MAN.
And guess what?
**I’m not staying quiet about the injustices the Democrats have done to black families — how they want to send our babies to broken schools, land them in prisons, and promise them “free” stuff!**
The Democrats have worked to brainwash black communities into thinking they NEED government handouts, when in reality, what we need are strong families.
I’ve teamed up with God, Guns, & Life PAC to spread my message to my black brothers and sisters around the nation. I want them to WAKE UP and see the truth I learned long ago: **__The Democrats don’t care about us.__**
We recently launched two billboards like the one you see above in Milwaukee, Wisconsin. They’re each getting 500 THOUSAND viewers per week -- and they’re turning some heads! I guess the good folks of Milwaukee weren’t expecting a black man like me to belong to the party of __freedom__ and __progress__. HA!
**[My goal is to get these billboards in 10 more states before November, so we can drive millions of black voters to our website where they can learn the truth about liberal policies -- and know that there is a better way. Can I count on your generous gift of $25, $50, $100, or more to EXPAND this bold and much-needed campaign to capture the black vote for Republicans this fall?](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0011_PdEnTfCmiFx5f1gn3BhMYtQO-hjVAjGHOWnV9KbgvQrZ1yjpa1my6Nq-tOXtv9iNgNP1ARrvXa3JavS9qW-2mSBglKtM0w7q6UCN9_DxBmpaUzR6XMT_lAiKyrQ5My0VezlgQ7nHaKkqQaKUv3MXr79qRHGp9P8eien3L97JIl7JS8xG6M45rksvFH5JPdXnqcY6PoX2Q=&c=w7PBoEPGB4Wld5_3ru3q6nJODiskNI3UfVwURxXefTotiffXM41KxA==&ch=BCcGyeHAc1vR__MUf5wJA0M_yr5TZl8qKTNzlDo6OL4r1ODOGpdRwQ==)** [**Help launch billboards targeting black voters!**](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0011_PdEnTfCmiFx5f1gn3BhMYtQO-hjVAjGHOWnV9KbgvQrZ1yjpa1my6Nq-tOXtv9iNgNP1ARrvXa3JavS9qW-2mSBglKtM0w7q6UCN9_DxBmpaUzR6XMT_lAiKyrQ5My0VezlgQ7nHaKkqQaKUv3MXr79qRHGp9P8eien3L97JIl7JS8xG6M45rksvFH5JPdXnqcY6PoX2Q=&c=w7PBoEPGB4Wld5_3ru3q6nJODiskNI3UfVwURxXefTotiffXM41KxA==&ch=BCcGyeHAc1vR__MUf5wJA0M_yr5TZl8qKTNzlDo6OL4r1ODOGpdRwQ==) You see, when we go into black communities, when we explain that the Democrats’ “war on poverty” ultimately removed black dads from families (by removing incentives for marriage), explain to them that Democrats are trying to take away Second Amendment rights from people who look like us, and target the lives of black babies through record abortion rates in our communities — they can’t believe it.
Republicans haven’t focused on the black vote enough, but I’m doing everything I can to change that this year.
_We don’t have much time to spare, and I am not a quiet man, so I’m working with the good folks at God, Guns, & Life PAC to shake things up in a creative way._
But we can’t do it alone!
**Please, PLEASE join me in letting black communities know — the Democrats DON’T care about you. They just care about your vote.**
But conservative, pro-family, pro-life, pro-liberty policies can heal the ills plaguing the black community and our nation. It’s time for black voters to leave the Democratic Party and vote for a brighter future!
**[No one else is doing what we are here at God, Guns,& Life PAC. No one is brave enough to say what we’re saying. But to make sure we reach black communities, I need your gift of $25 or more today to launch more of these “head turning” billboards and make a difference in this year’s elections.](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0011_PdEnTfCmiFx5f1gn3BhMYtQO-hjVAjGHOWnV9KbgvQrZ1yjpa1my6Nq-tOXtv9iNgNP1ARrvXa3JavS9qW-2mSBglKtM0w7q6UCN9_DxBmpaUzR6XMT_lAiKyrQ5My0VezlgQ7nHaKkqQaKUv3MXr79qRHGp9P8eien3L97JIl7JS8xG6M45rksvFH5JPdXnqcY6PoX2Q=&c=w7PBoEPGB4Wld5_3ru3q6nJODiskNI3UfVwURxXefTotiffXM41KxA==&ch=BCcGyeHAc1vR__MUf5wJA0M_yr5TZl8qKTNzlDo6OL4r1ODOGpdRwQ==)**
For freedom,
YG Nyghtstorm National Spokesman God, Guns, Life PAC Paid for by God, Guns & Life PAC. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. [www.godgunslife.com](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0011_PdEnTfCmiFx5f1gn3BhMYtQO-hjVAjGHOWnV9KbgvQrZ1yjpa1my6Nq-tOXtv9q5BGIPQYxR4V-9NtGpoUh9spVC7wobs2shwGA5CLEVzz6qqHV52sIy-zvbj6ZuK3LP6OlLy9pB6uMA1muSnnJA==&c=w7PBoEPGB4Wld5_3ru3q6nJODiskNI3UfVwURxXefTotiffXM41KxA==&ch=BCcGyeHAc1vR__MUf5wJA0M_yr5TZl8qKTNzlDo6OL4r1ODOGpdRwQ==) Contributions to the God, Gun & Life PAC are not tax-deductible as charitable contributions.

name: Lisa Scheller
subject: FINAL YARD SIGN ORDER
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Scheller for Congress, Inc
body:
In just a matter of two weeks now, this race will be done. The ballot boxes will be closed and votes will be in the process of being counted. Our camp Peter, In just a matter of two weeks now, this race will be done. The ballot boxes will be closed and votes will be in the process of being counted. Our campaign headquarters will shut the doors, and we will have left everything on the table.
BUT -- that’s two weeks from now. On THIS Wednesday night (tomorrow,) we will be placing our FINAL order for yard signs to place throughout the Lehigh Valley to garner every last vote before voters head to the polling booths.
Everywhere I drive, I see yard signs for my radical opponent and Nancy Pelosi’s ally, and I want to be sure that when they see her name, they also see OUR name.
**[While we have placed 15,000 signs across the district, we are down to our last 100, and we NEED to place an order TOMORROW NIGHT.](http://links.schellerforcongress.com/u/click?_t=2618b931a0124f90ba4a51cf9fda2c48&_m=de12aaf67c32416e9813e0c9af0fe11c&_e=1T6oPMWoJrCNUz4ILGk6LJDwu1rEF4bbsFNYsV8NeATrDvg_0weDET0AzVuK-s-5Zl_r10FEHXSz5ypO7T2vEnqwx7_vWtTDPFUCiEqq_tv9sy9HUcBXllfCDp2NzTkD9epc4Rf8rFjlYcJXAEWHb-rIpsL_0Qbjog8hSuQYx8nsy3IyeiPLLQBrm6s1kuWp1IPhGKHtV3xz-gMOC5GbMPnMIPJVFgZm4PKRzpej7jtSSAVVnoPW4ezAOSjZ6hEFlzzQoeSLzh5Orye7Di8F6RuFGtX_c_kvQ-EcwJfC9qkEi-ZBoMZhaPcyo6nqyEpdpZqV8FEKzsD_at0RFNSBTbd8_wa07HeYGXXaHTZdIRJg6GGxAoSLxx9xWziYjp9fmHSJpsJqzppIoRBalZyiO0WH1u4qi0OR5nwJ0Brt3kwXNJh4nJWojFD8hW46BlNQSASmFn6yzXKTZxTZVZ2dWg%3D%3D)** [**Help Get Yard Signs Funded**](http://links.schellerforcongress.com/u/click?_t=2618b931a0124f90ba4a51cf9fda2c48&_m=de12aaf67c32416e9813e0c9af0fe11c&_e=1T6oPMWoJrCNUz4ILGk6LJDwu1rEF4bbsFNYsV8NeATrDvg_0weDET0AzVuK-s-5Zl_r10FEHXSz5ypO7T2vEnqwx7_vWtTDPFUCiEqq_tv9sy9HUcBXllfCDp2NzTkD9epc4Rf8rFjlYcJXAEWHb-rIpsL_0Qbjog8hSuQYx8nsy3IyeiPLLQBrm6s1kuWp1IPhGKHtV3xz-gMOC5GbMPnMIPJVFgZm4PKRzpej7jvCp9ltxC6kifDRMrDeWz32h2-i6NKqoVpbHfaPtiVyvE1a0_pyVA_fi4zhNsqJHqnWJfiUUEZ1ej2KlgdD5f_k3R3JnJW2GqduacbNhcyv1Ihskd2-oBzUm2KuvVxOCxEMnTuwGvJZTTqiEo0-gDtgDkPN_kbxeIarTOzutMdRnCzCVFHoNcMRXzqYbh5IaqcLtqgRbwaE_QARJrAtOwThl_Npkc-tSHF8DtuSYu6zxQ%3D%3D) **[We want to cover lawns with yard signs to ensure our name is as present as possible, but in order to do that, we need you to chip in $50 IMMEDIATELY. clean_body: Already cast a ballot? Have a rock-solid voting plan in place? Wondering what else you can do to help spread our message across the state and get... | | | | ---|---|--- Friend, We’re two weeks out from Election Day! Already cast a ballot? Have a rock-solid voting plan in place? Wondering what else you can do to help spread our message across the state and get the vote out for Governor Holcomb? Don’t worry — you can continue to make a huge impact on the election (without even leaving your house!). We’re excited to share these Facebook profile picture frames with you so that you can show your support for Governor Holcomb! Using a Facebook profile picture frame is a simple way to help us spread Governor Holcomb’s message as he continues building One Indiana for All! Our team has also created additional graphics to be used as a cover photo on Facebook, Twitter & Instagram. Check out our graphics here: Thank you for voting for Eric and for spreading the word on social media — we can’t do this without the team, and we’re counting on you to help us continue building One Indiana for All. subject: We're down to the wire
body:
Help us call and text every Latino to vote | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/23477c3233d5/were-down-to-the-wire?e=b8f90417f9)
---
| |
---
| | Dear ,

This is it. We have 14 days to change the course of this country by sending Vice President Joe Biden and Senator Kamala Harris to the White House and ushering in a Democratic Senate. With your help, we have been able to do incredible work with Nuestro PAC and the Latino community. Our plan now is to call and text **EVERY** Latino in the **COUNTRY** to remind them to vote, but to do this we need your support.

[Your donations have allowed us to reach thousands of Latinos. We are counting on your support to finish what we started and get out the vote! **Will you donate $5 or more to help get every Latino in the United States out to vote?**](https://solidaritystrategies.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=985fddf6f660c0281e297f819&id=ff76b43c8c&e=b8f90417f9)

Thank you for your support. We can win this fight!

In Solidarity,

Chuck Rocha

body:
These final weeks are going to be an all-out sprint, and before it gets too crazy, I wanted to take a second and give you a quick election update. [ ](http://links.email.nancymace.org/u/click?_t=b7e0c98b86c6435ea03767402a51b3fc&_m=01c4b939d8aa409995144b496d63b672&_e=lb_d5GW-lLhV7AhOnbcleGd1Dqago-WwfscACtpRTjyuK07qeOEYPqPUF5PspZEEguRBl_wdiwFTIYsJDagMGT7chsq5YTTHaHt_aLsiUZsSkoTKdY-7HEuLFsukjBfo2VpT5gxfqoxa9l8uk01i_HDF1-tjPWcck-zZiXRdhsrgRka_gLJwj-dAmKmeC0MKKh130on7gT-hqbl9dmckD_XVFKHBao6mnlyn4Byf1EuoedGeGcb-u7L_yByUtkCkbhLgIEkgR5cIkVHnP3gyXfFbH2P8aQewe3wPFbAK5Bcsu9IoppaznxHIdoJtzlnRDzZsW8o2igTm3gtqeiFCMOagLKszAGu69SoebaErrdXyed-2woRbr3YcOGChu-wCRoyl7msve8rMovk85b64yZ-FdEc57OhqZtSqnqMFNu7Gp-V9Yk-OTG8kjlgnmYjJS4Oi_amDuUJabO9nTmi420x6h5rqgszkxJHAhHrYj9A%3D) Hey Friend - it’s Nancy.
**I can’t even believe it, but Election Day is two weeks away. **
These final weeks are going to be an all-out sprint, and before it gets too crazy, I wanted to take a second and give you a quick election update.
Friend, our campaign has been absolutely rolling and we are exactly where we want to be. We surged ahead of my opponent — Democrat Joe Cunningham — in the polls and the enthusiasm of our grassroots community is unmatched.
**Last quarter, I was one of the only GOP challengers to outraise my opponent — all thanks to people like you, Friend. **
But it’s not over — the most important stretch of our race is just around the corner, and I’m counting on you to come through for me again. I know we can win this race and restore real, results-focused leadership to the Lowcountry if we outwork my opponent every single day from now until Election Day.
We need a leader who puts the Lowcountry First more than ever, and I promise to be that leader.
**[Will you help my campaign finish strong and donate today?](http://links.email.nancymace.org/u/click?_t=b7e0c98b86c6435ea03767402a51b3fc&_m=01c4b939d8aa409995144b496d63b672&_e=lb_d5GW-lLhV7AhOnbcleGd1Dqago-WwfscACtpRTjyuK07qeOEYPqPUF5PspZEEguRBl_wdiwFTIYsJDagMGT7chsq5YTTHaHt_aLsiUZsSkoTKdY-7HEuLFsukjBfo2VpT5gxfqoxa9l8uk01i_HDF1-tjPWcck-zZiXRdhsrgRka_gLJwj-dAmKmeC0MKKh130on7gT-hqbl9dmckD_XVFKHBao6mnlyn4Byf1EuoedGeGcb-u7L_yByUtkCkbhLgIEkgR5cIkVHnP3gyXXcDHm0qAF0gk-gszbVElaXHiVQ43HY7KlQQA4cQyJkF5leDZu6r_xXBOodYhERvSiEQj8CUY4v15YpcbRMq9SojZYGankiIOWNtwveJJjsS4IeN-APQLGk_bT5ZVZFv3ptfJH2PNo9eM6wr4H92ynkx5bEPOZANlBtzDv0HNUtTjRp6a7lkeOqZcYcQOBzIZ3Gnfdc4z4NUM75lglR5P40%3D)**
Use this link to chip in: **[https://secure.winred.com/nancymace/action-1634686/two-weeks/dpwillis67@gmail.com](http://links.email.nancymace.org/u/click?_t=b7e0c98b86c6435ea03767402a51b3fc&_m=01c4b939d8aa409995144b496d63b672&_e=lb_d5GW-lLhV7AhOnbcleGd1Dqago-WwfscACtpRTjyuK07qeOEYPqPUF5PspZEEguRBl_wdiwFTIYsJDagMGT7chsq5YTTHaHt_aLsiUZsSkoTKdY-7HEuLFsukjBfo2VpT5gxfqoxa9l8uk01i_HDF1-tjPWcck-zZiXRdhsrgRka_gLJwj-dAmKmeC0MKKh130on7gT-hqbl9dmckD_XVFKHBao6mnlyn4Byf1EuoedGeGcb-u7L_yByUtkCkbhLgIEkgR5cIkVHnP3gyXV5L-YDZWkHn06IB8bBadqi3Yb-RW8RoOGb8g9UPFtia2d5A6Hlkgl6CeAlMI6_Japyz84K3KalUGzmaNaIqgtvhPb_QbOw9OqvQ5GgK-v1cgjgKNlqNjtFLV_EABGIknvxqK9MckpSe2o8X1oXew8DF2j-Q167ygSHZa30Y7zINYYriRw6jXSk6VYsLjROWS7McZzMoiqBVwD28ouDw0w8%3D)**

name: Jay Inslee
subject: This race matters in Pennsylvania
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JAY INSLEE FOR WASHINGTON (D)
body:
Our wins here are a template for what we could do across the country.
| [](https://act.jayinslee.com/go/8912?t=3&akid=8198%2E868730%2EHsdKKx) Friend, When so much is happening in national politics, it might not seem like a governor's race in Washington state should get much of your attention -- but here's why it should: Our success in building bold, transformative, progressive policies in Washington has become a model for the nation. Want proof? We're taking aggressive action on the climate crisis. We've made historic investments in clean energy to grow jobs and tackle the climate crisis, while ranking as the best state to do business. Now, leaders in red and blue states are following our lead and growing their clean energy sector. We had the first cases of COVID-19 in the nation and then became a model for tackling the pandemic through strong, steady, moral leadership. Our success at the state level shows our federal government what is possible, especially as we rebuild from the disastrous Trump administration. **We are the last generation that can do anything about these historic challenges.[Will you chip in $5 or more right now from Pennsylvania to help us win in Washington state?](https://act.jayinslee.com/go/13316?t=4&akid=8198%2E868730%2EHsdKKx)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [$5 →](https://act.jayinslee.com/go/13317?t=5&akid=8198%2E868730%2EHsdKKx)
---
| | [$10 →](https://act.jayinslee.com/go/13318?t=6&akid=8198%2E868730%2EHsdKKx)
---
| [$25 →](https://act.jayinslee.com/go/13319?t=7&akid=8198%2E868730%2EHsdKKx)
---
| | [$50 →](https://act.jayinslee.com/go/13320?t=8&akid=8198%2E868730%2EHsdKKx)
---
| [$100 →](https://act.jayinslee.com/go/13321?t=9&akid=8198%2E868730%2EHsdKKx)
---
| | [OTHER →](https://act.jayinslee.com/go/13316?t=10&akid=8198%2E868730%2EHsdKKx)
---
The same national political trends that threaten our country's democracy are a force here in Washington. My opponent, Loren Culp, is using Trump's playbook at every turn -- with in-person rallies, disturbing rhetoric, and refusing to wear a mask. Beating back the national trend of that brand of hateful politics must start right here in Washington.
Republicans across the country know all of this. They know that the progress we make here affects them at home, too. So they've been flooding my race with grassroots money to support my extremist, Trump-y opponent. My seat is one of only a handful of governorships Republicans (and the very well-funded Republican Governors Association) can focus on, and they're hoping state races like mine fly under the radar until it's just too late to do anything about it.
We can't let it happen. We can't halt or stall the progress we've made on the climate crisis or COVID-19 or paid family leave or gun violence prevention.
We're not done yet. There's more to do. And we need you on our team to keep up the progress.
**Every win here could be a win in Pennsylvania, too. You in?[Donate $5 or more right now to invest in a win here in Washington state. It will set the stage for the progress yet to come, wherever you are located.](https://act.jayinslee.com/go/13316?t=11&akid=8198%2E868730%2EHsdKKx)**
Very truly yours,
Jay
[DONATE](https://act.jayinslee.com/go/13316?t=12&akid=8198%2E868730%2EHsdKKx)
---

subject: Two weeks to go, here's the news
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pat Hackett for Congress
body:
Every dollar and every volunteer hour helps us mobilize to bring us the “W” on election night. | | | | [ ](https://foundationbluemedia.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c156e612ce88db66e08a28197&id=99f4716643&e=5886ca081d)
---
| | | [ ](https://foundationbluemedia.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c156e612ce88db66e08a28197&id=01ea5f80a9&e=5886ca081d)
---
|
Dear Friend,

We are in the home stretch of this election, and pouring everything we have into these last two weeks. Every dollar and every volunteer hour helps us mobilize to bring home the “W” on election night. We need your help to retire Jackie once and for all.

---
| [BRING HOME THE "W"](https://foundationbluemedia.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c156e612ce88db66e08a28197&id=41f1a211a1&e=5886ca081d "BRING HOME THE "W"")
---
|

The [South Bend Tribune](https://foundationbluemedia.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c156e612ce88db66e08a28197&id=dd0f30eb7f&e=5886ca081d) published an article over the weekend comparing two rallies that occurred this past weekend. The first, a Women’s March and grassroots rally honoring the legacy of Ruth Bader Ginsburg, was locally organized and held at Howard Park as one of 125 across the country. People of all ages gathered to protect women’s voices and rights by echoing Kamala Harris’ now famous statement, “I am speaking.” In contrast, a smaller rally was held outside Jackie Walorski’s Mishawaka office by an outside Washington-based group called, “Concerned Women for America Legislative Action Committee.” According to the Tribune, the out of state group that was bused in claims it “advocates [for] bringing biblical principles into all levels of public policy.” You can read the article here:

---
| [READ THE ARTICLE](https://foundationbluemedia.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c156e612ce88db66e08a28197&id=0f52a45b8a&e=5886ca081d "READ THE ARTICLE")
---
|

Pat spoke to a crowd of more than 200 women and allies who gathered at Howard Park in defense of women’s rights and to protest the current administration’s nomination of Amy Coney Barrett to the Supreme Court. **Pat’s address to the crowd was bold and decisive. She affirmed that we must not be silenced. We must speak up if our democracy is to survive.** Pat warned against the patriarchal perspective that Judge Barrett will bring to the Supreme Court, speaking about her judicial record and the actions Judge Barrett has taken that indicate her opposition to the Affordable Care Act, reproductive rights, and LGBTQ rights. Pat vowed to protect these rights as the next Congresswoman for IN02.

In stark contrast to the Women’s March where people were socially distanced and wearing masks, only a quarter of those gathered outside Walorski’s office were wearing masks. **And here’s where the hypocrisy and lack of leadership from Jackie really trickles down.** The chair of the St. Joseph County Republican Party handed out masks not for public safety but for political appearances. He was quoted by the Tribune saying to the women from the outside group, “TV will kill us” if we’re caught without wearing them.

The difference between leadership is real. The difference between Pat who believes in science, evidence, and reason versus Jackie who is a science denier is on the ballot Nov. 3rd.

Please help us get our message out across the district. [**Please contribute today for a representative who is an unwavering advocate, a trusted leader, and who will be an authentic representative in the People’s House**.](https://foundationbluemedia.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c156e612ce88db66e08a28197&id=dc1d1ee29b&e=5886ca081d)

---
| [CHIP IN $10](https://foundationbluemedia.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c156e612ce88db66e08a28197&id=ed031c2ec7&e=5886ca081d "CHIP IN $10")
---
| [CHIP IN $25](https://foundationbluemedia.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c156e612ce88db66e08a28197&id=0352a058b5&e=5886ca081d "CHIP IN $25")
---
| [CHIP IN $50](https://foundationbluemedia.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c156e612ce88db66e08a28197&id=94c7ef08fd&e=5886ca081d "CHIP IN $50")
---
| [CHIP IN $100](https://foundationbluemedia.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c156e612ce88db66e08a28197&id=8d7a37f860&e=5886ca081d "CHIP IN $100")
---
| [CHIP IN ANOTHER AMOUNT](https://foundationbluemedia.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c156e612ce88db66e08a28197&id=61f1d51986&e=5886ca081d "CHIP IN ANOTHER AMOUNT")
---
|
Let's finish these last two weeks strong!

Team Hackett
---

| Pat Hackett is a lifelong advocate for her community. Now, she's running for Congress to reclaim the People's House, return authority to the people, and end the corrupting influence of money in politics. She will fight to end corruption in politics so that we can provide healthcare for everyone, end the gun violence epidemic, and address the catastrophic challenges of climate change.
---

name: House DFL Updates
subject: The Republican plan isn't a plan at all

name: Betsy
subject: My District named the Bellwether!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Betsy Rader
body:
| | | |
---
---
Lake County in my State Senate District is being called the bellwether for Ohio. And if Ohio goes blue November 3, Trump has no path to victory! The numbers reported yesterday for my District by Karen Kasler of the Statehouse News Bureau are incredible. Lake and Portage Counties (_two of the three counties in my State Senate District_) have dramatic increases in Democratic-affiliated voters while the Republican numbers are dropping. Check it out: [](https://act.myngp.com/el/Nl7xO0vZzITbJuFt7mc-oKO0vmJofEjqWJaH1vrN05U=/Ad8XoQTLv7Boqjv8uXqVKkQ8rX2UHRwzEuiXFu3vkOs=) [](https://act.myngp.com/el/Nl7xO0vZzITbJuFt7mc-oKO0vmJofEjqWJaH1vrN05U=/5jxwqRvKkvUwakS41483xBBtBVAbfUMUZs-jx_0tXU4=) _**The numbers are in our reach.**_ You can see why the Republicans are spending so much money on lying attack ads against me. Winning this District is pivotal not just for Ohio but for the country's future. The polling for my race shows that if voters hear our message, we win -- and so we must communicate more than ever to break through their negative attacks. We can do this, but we have to step on the gas in these last two weeks. We must do everything in our power, because it is within our power, to restore politics to the people. **[If you can, chip in $30 today to make sure voters hear our message.](https://act.myngp.com/el/Nl7xO0vZzITbJuFt7mc-oKO0vmJofEjqWJaH1vrN05U=/tqQ5p9qG7RgexgdL3RbX3bUG3vQIhXb8MBnV6JuotEo=?refcode=10.20&amount=30) **And _please_ send this to at least 5 friends. Encourage them to donate, volunteer, and most importantly, to vote! Sincerely, [](https://act.myngp.com/el/Nl7xO0vZzITbJuFt7mc-oKO0vmJofEjqWJaH1vrN05U=/X2f0lSOZCLYFK3LperIw9hMR2eyUSqfQPo0Yq5Jf1HA=?refcode=10.20&amount=15) [](https://act.myngp.com/el/Nl7xO0vZzITbJuFt7mc-oKO0vmJofEjqWJaH1vrN05U=/X2f0lSOZCLYFK3LperIw9hMR2eyUSqfQPo0Yq5Jf1HA=?refcode=10.20&amount=50) [](https://act.myngp.com/el/Nl7xO0vZzITbJuFt7mc-oKO0vmJofEjqWJaH1vrN05U=/X2f0lSOZCLYFK3LperIw9hMR2eyUSqfQPo0Yq5Jf1HA=?refcode=10.20&amount=255) [](https://act.myngp.com/el/Nl7xO0vZzITbJuFt7mc-oKO0vmJofEjqWJaH1vrN05U=/X2f0lSOZCLYFK3LperIw9hMR2eyUSqfQPo0Yq5Jf1HA=?refcode=10.20&amount=100) [](https://act.myngp.com/el/Nl7xO0vZzITbJuFt7mc-oKO0vmJofEjqWJaH1vrN05U=/X2f0lSOZCLYFK3LperIw9hMR2eyUSqfQPo0Yq5Jf1HA=?refcode=10.20) [](https://act.myngp.com/el/Nl7xO0vZzITbJuFt7mc-oKO0vmJofEjqWJaH1vrN05U=/bTlGFNBAnyU0PfqEIabJWhDUY-pJO64s0nY4SjPLAJU=) [](https://act.myngp.com/el/Nl7xO0vZzITbJuFt7mc-oKO0vmJofEjqWJaH1vrN05U=/CQ9kw4-_DA8x5Wq3pI8DtFpiLjSkD5ewykfz8Va_ZrY=) [](https://act.myngp.com/el/Nl7xO0vZzITbJuFt7mc-oKO0vmJofEjqWJaH1vrN05U=/KyMDpQyl_J7gYC_OXZ3qIW3w-2PTObUCLXc2ePHfMj4=) [](https://act.myngp.com/el/Nl7xO0vZzITbJuFt7mc-oKO0vmJofEjqWJaH1vrN05U=/6kvvWMDJ02Qs1yxsnswxSzau9YYcLXL4FFBm_HeS_C4=)

Millions of Americans are depending on the Post Office to deliver their prescriptions, benefits, mail-in ballots, and more.

But Trump and the GOP are doing everything they can to destroy the USPS, and make their corporate donors richer.

**_[The fact is, Peter: The Post Office won't survive if Trump is re-elected. ](https://act.eastmanforcongress.com/page/m/17c6e8a6/77d4c309/220645cc/2635a008/2029951153/VEsC/p/eyJlM3RoYlc5MWJuUjlmUT09IjoiNSIsImUzdHpaV052Ym1SZllXMXZkVzUwZlgwPSI6IjI1IiwiZTN0MGFHbHlaRjloYlc5MWJuUjlmUT09IjoiNTAiLCJlM3RtYjNWeWRHaGZZVzF2ZFc1MGZYMD0iOiIxMDAiLCJlM3RtYVdaMGFGOWhiVzkxYm5SOWZRPT0iOiIyNTAifQ%3D%3D/?g=SoBiD8btZKdfO2weHdUSFCA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/eastmanforcongress-em?refcode=20201017_em_fr_b1_kara_90op&amount=5&amounts=25,50,100,250")_**

Trump knows my race could DECIDE the 2020 Presidential outcome.

Over a million dollars of dark money is pouring into the district to defeat me.

Kara Eastman is running to flip Nebraska's second district from red to blue. She has dedicated her entire career to bettering her community through nonprofits and social work. She was inspired to run for office after her mom got cancer for the 5th time, and was prescribed a pill that cost $2500. Kara's mom chose to keep her house, and lost her battle with cancer after losing her life-savings to cancer drugs. As Kara watched her Republican Representative Don Bacon vote to repeal the Affordable Care Act and rob millions of their access to health care, she knew she couldn't sit on the sidelines.

If you want to support Kara's campaign for Congress, [_**please rush in a donation here. >>**_](https://act.eastmanforcongress.com/page/m/17c6e8a6/77d4c309/220645cc/2635a030/2029951153/VEsHAA/?g=SoBiD8btZKdfO2weHdUSFCA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/eastmanforcongress-em?refcode=em_footer&amount=25")

Another thing -- we know we send a lot of fundraising emails. It's because Kara has pledged not to take a cent of corporate PAC money. Unlike her Republican opponent, she relies on this grassroots community to fund her campaign. If you'd like to receive fewer emails from Kara, [_**please click here.**_](https://act.eastmanforcongress.com/page/m/17c6e8a6/77d4c309/220645cc/2635a033/2029951153/VEsHAw/?g=SoBiD8btZKdfO2weHdUSFCA "https://act.eastmanforcongress.com/page/s/receive-fewer-emails") We'd hate to lose you completely, but if you'd like to unsubscribe, [_please click here._](https://act.eastmanforcongress.com/page/m/17c6e8a6/77d4c309/220645cc/2635a032/2029951153/VEsHAg/?g=SoBiD8btZKdfO2weHdUSFCA "https://act.eastmanforcongress.com/page/content/unsub-footer/")

We can't tell you how much Kara appreciates your grassroots support!
