name: Stephen Lawson (Team Kelly)
subject: RICHARD GRENELL ENDORSES KELLY LOEFFLER FOR U.S. SENATE
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Georgians for Kelly Loeffler
body:
---
| | | | | |
---
| FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE TUESDAY, OCTOBER 20, 2020
RICHARD GRENELL ENDORSES KELLY LOEFFLER FOR U.S. SENATE
ATLANTA - Today, Former Acting Director of National Intelligence Richard Grenell endorsed conservative businesswoman and political outsider Kelly Loeffler in her race for U.S. Senate. Acting Director Grenell served as President Trump's U.S. Ambassador to Germany from 2018-2020. He was appointed by the President to serve as Acting Director of National Intelligence from Feb - May 2020. Grenell was also a featured [speaker](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001YlDqLoz7nEqY3jvpq6ru84LnKUF2m6XtNtuKkFCiCh50TNLmwSC3SjoD_JiDWP6fKu2RcJLuXUziDOiG0ls7cxCRve6Y2EhxVFEO8flsU-TnYjTxor4rYG2mkDVRCqp8QC_15jfrQidB1ZLIq0NNtlaxvhB39WUfvv6eZi1iDTMNEFS4M_fV0kANRedbt9lsz-fp0XilFTbKiwg5GSpcbA==&c=3alHjZ5kiX2DpF4V6gtPp6R9RyokRyczj5DOoffF6yStoYPBUDBXHw==&ch=WrCAH_z6i3nR0rSDNMt70Y_Kau-44OKdN8WV4NeIkA_rHuNiNbatEg==) at the 2020 Republican National Convention and continues to be one of the most prominent surrogates for President Trump.
"I am proud to endorse my good friend and proven conservative leader Kelly Loeffler for U.S. Senate. Kelly is ranked the most conservative U.S. Senator, she has a 100-percent voting record supporting President Trump, and has been endorsed by the National Right to Life with a 100-percent pro-life rating," said Grenell. "It's important that we send a political outsider to Washington. Kelly has been leading the charge in the Senate to hold China accountable, stand up to Big Tech, and fight against the Swamp. President Trump needs Kelly Loeffler in Washington, and I encourage everyone in Georgia to vote for her on November 3."
"I am so honored to have the support of Ric Grenell, who has been one of the President's biggest supporters in implementing his America First Agenda," said Senator Loeffler. "Having the support of such a strong, Pro-Trump, tough conservative fighter like Ric is a tremendous honor. As a conservative businesswoman and political outsider, I look forward to working with Ric, President Trump and other fearless conservative voices in the coming years as we fight to Keep America Great."
---
|
---
| Richard Grenell joins the growing [list](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001YlDqLoz7nEqY3jvpq6ru84LnKUF2m6XtNtuKkFCiCh50TNLmwSC3SsB9yapP9pT09FjbB1MWSLJ0wLb1IY3PuxSQHdAb1LgjlV7qdeBV7Mmklak9a2NVLA8_YjwkI1npuQJ4hyREokG6bHdIldzKYgXo4LZ6hMQsRiDMLJ9T7vc=&c=3alHjZ5kiX2DpF4V6gtPp6R9RyokRyczj5DOoffF6yStoYPBUDBXHw==&ch=WrCAH_z6i3nR0rSDNMt70Y_Kau-44OKdN8WV4NeIkA_rHuNiNbatEg==) of conservatives uniting to support Senator Loeffler in her bid to defend Georgia values. Senator Loeffler holds a strong lead in state and national endorsements, has a substantial fundraising advantage, and is the only candidate with organized grassroots support in all 159 counties. To view the full list of Senator Loeffler's endorsements, click [HERE](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001YlDqLoz7nEqY3jvpq6ru84LnKUF2m6XtNtuKkFCiCh50TNLmwSC3SsB9yapP9pT09FjbB1MWSLJ0wLb1IY3PuxSQHdAb1LgjlV7qdeBV7Mmklak9a2NVLA8_YjwkI1npuQJ4hyREokG6bHdIldzKYgXo4LZ6hMQsRiDMLJ9T7vc=&c=3alHjZ5kiX2DpF4V6gtPp6R9RyokRyczj5DOoffF6yStoYPBUDBXHw==&ch=WrCAH_z6i3nR0rSDNMt70Y_Kau-44OKdN8WV4NeIkA_rHuNiNbatEg==).
### Stephen Lawson Communications Director stephen@kellyforsenate.com
---
|

name: =?utf-8?Q?Governor=20Terry=20Branstad?=
subject: Election Day is two weeks away, here's what I think
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY FEENSTRA FOR CONGRESS
body:
It’s great to be back home and |
---
| |
---
| | Friend,
---
| It’s great to be back home and on the campaign trail once again for a slate of terrific candidates! Today, I’m writing to you on behalf on my friend, Randy Feenstra, who I’m proud to support in such a crucial election.
---
| [Click here to join me](https://feenstraforcongress.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5970947ea371ac8a6b92da016&id=883723869f&e=d48ad6f8f4 "Click here to join me")
---
| With all of the challenges facing Iowa and America, it’s critical that we elect leaders that are up to the task. Now is the time for serious, effective leadership – Senators and Representatives that know how to do the job, who have been in the arena and who can make meaningful progress and actually deliver results. I can tell you that Randy is that kind of leader because I’ve seen him in action, and I know he has a proven record of results.

The future of this state, and of this country, depends on us electing leaders that can do the job, and that means each and every one of us doing our part to make it happen. That means getting out to vote on November 3rd if you haven’t already, talking to your friends and family about voting, and chipping in whatever you can – whether it be $20, $30, or $50 – to help Randy reach as many undecided voters as possible.
---
| [Click here to chip in!](https://feenstraforcongress.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5970947ea371ac8a6b92da016&id=b83aaef2b2&e=d48ad6f8f4 "Click here to chip in!")
---
| With only two weeks until Election 2020, every action counts, and you can be the difference maker!

Sincerely,
_Governor Terry Branstad_
---
|
---
| | | PAID FOR BY FEENSTRA FOR CONGRESS
---
| Feenstra For Congress641 2nd StHull, IA 51239-7323

name: =?utf-8?Q?The=20White=20House?=
subject: Obamacare’s Illusion of Preexisting Condition Protections
body:
President Trump’s recent executive order laying out his ‘America-First Healthcare Plan’ makes clear his continued commitment to the long-standing... | | | | [ ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=ce7bbc5984&e=3ee4985eea)
---
| | |
# **Obamacare’s Illusion of Preexisting Condition Protections**

“President Trump’s recent executive order laying out his ‘America-First Healthcare Plan’ makes clear his continued commitment to the long-standing, bipartisan consensus that we should protect people with preexisting conditions. Unfortunately, the previous administration’s attempt to make good on that consensus—Obamacare—has failed to deliver on its promises,” CMS Administrator Seema Verma writes in _National Review._

“It’s time the national debate over Obamacare finally confronts this reality.”

[Click here to read more.](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=c9c6750a8c&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
| “In ten days, we expect a report that says third quarter real GDP rebounded at a 33.4% annual rate,” economist Brian Wesbury writes. “The sharp rebound in Q3 is a testament to the underlying strength of the US economy before the shutdowns . . . Moreover, the US entered this government-mandated recession with the highest incomes and lowest poverty rate we have ever recorded.” Read more in [_RealClearPolitics_](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=d464b1e877&e=3ee4985eea).
---
|
---
| “I have always said that HUD’s true measure of success is not how many individuals we can get onto our assistance programs, but how many we can lift out of government assistance and set on the path to self-sufficiency. Under Trump’s leadership, there is a rising tide lifting all boats,” Housing & Urban Development Secretary Ben Carson writes for the [_Washington Examiner_](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=6da58b7376&e=3ee4985eea).
---
|
---
| “President Trump announced Monday that he will be removing Sudan from the State Department’s state sponsors of terrorism list after the Sudanese government agreed to pay $335 million in compensation for families of American victims of terrorism . . . Trump's announcement is part of a wider agreement that is expected to include moves from Sudan toward normalizing relations with Israel,” Barak Ravid writes for [_Axios_](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=1e1e5d4c91&e=3ee4985eea).
---
|

[Privacy Policy](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=9fb80681aa&e=3ee4985eea) | [Contact the White House](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=369dd18f35&e=3ee4985eea) | [Unsubscribe](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=8cafb01033&e=3ee4985eea&c=6965cae62c)
---
| | | The White House * 1600 Pennsylvania Ave NW * Washington, DC 20500 * USA · 202-456-1111
---

name: =?utf-8?Q?Amy=20Ryan=20Courser?=
subject: Get to Know Your Next U.S. Representative
disclaimer_text: Paid for and authorized by Amy Ryan Courser for Congress
body:
Amy Ryan Courser is Fighting for Common Sense Leadership Oregonians Deserve

View this email in your browser (https://mailchi.mp/amyfororegon.com/leftists-terrorists-occupy-our-streets-9554209?e=36bbc8e2ca)
Dear Peter,

Hello! I am Amy Ryan Courser, your nominee for Congress. We are in the middle of the worst year our state has seen due to Oregon’s years of failed leadership! Now I fear that if we do not take control of our state, we will have nothing left to fight for and we will lose our precious Oregon. I normally hate discussing fear, but I am terrified in the direction of our state. I am fighting for our Oregon and to right these failures. We have been forgotten for too long and in our current crisis I felt I needed to reach out to you and introduce myself as your candidate. I want you to know who I am so you can help me save Oregon!

I am not a career politician. I am a mom, self-employed business owner and a foster care survivor. I am a 30-year community servant with a service and voting record that is respected and unrivaled.

I am running for Congress in our beautiful 5th District here in Oregon. Our district is a key purple district, and I am in a dead heat against do-nothing career politician incumbent Kurt Schrader.

Kurt Shrader has put the interests of Oregonians last for the past three decades! He supported both the impeachment and defunding our police while refusing federal assistance. He votes in favor of increasing taxes, Cap and Trade and the Green New Deal, all which will kill Oregon industry. He temporarily relinquished his vote on behalf of Oregonians to an Arizona congressman which included the forestry vote that should have protected Oregonians from our current forestry crisis. For 20 years he has made promises and done absolutely nothing! While he talks a good line, the fact is that he has abandoned Oregonians and farmers by moving from the Agriculture Committee to the Energy Committee. More importantly he is unethical and aligns himself with lawless extremists, failed leadership, voting with Nancy Pelosi and Kate Brown almost 100% of the time.

Will you help me in this fight? We can win this purple, 50/50 district and take back our state and America!
DONATE TODAY! (https://secure.anedot.com/amy-ryan-courser-for-congress/donate-to-amy?utm_source=Amy+Ryan+Courser+for+Congress&utm_campaign=856c60ea22-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2020_08_14_04_10_COPY_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_0625c183a9-856c60ea22-221104281)
My seat is WINNABLE! We are in a 50/50 District, one of 8 in the entire nation! I am polling strong and we have more momentum than ever to win this seat! I need your help now to finish strong, your vote and your contribution. I am committed to bringing YOUR conservative voice from Oregon to Washington DC to represent YOU the people with common sense! With your help we can stop the insanity!

My opponent is an elitist pharmaceutical heir to Pfizer, living in New York where he resides with his wife and where he neglected to put his $2,000,000 property on his federal FEC report. This is my home and I will make Oregonians my first and top priority, not special interest groups! I have vowed to not take any money from pharmaceuticals, and I have pledged to vote IN FAVOR of term limits to end the career politicians and deep corruption.

I have been a fighter my whole life, starting as a foster care kid. Now I want to take that fight to Washington DC as your Congresswoman. I promise to fight for OUR conservative values and against Socialism which includes my passion for fighting for our 2nd Amendment and our constitution!

IF DEMOCRATS WIN THIS ELECTION, OREGON LOSES. YOU WILL SEE A SOCIALIST GOVERNMENT WITH KAMALA’S ADMINISTRATION AND AOC AS SPEAKER OF THE HOUSE! WE CANNOT LET THIS HAPPEN!

I promise to fight for Oregonians with integrity, accountability and compassion!

I will be a champion for Oregonians. It will be my priority to defend law and order ensuring public safety. I will fight against overburdensome regulations, work on decreasing taxes while I work diligently for our economic recovery. I will fight for the rights and freedoms guaranteed in our constitution and work hard to find solutions for affordable healthcare. I will work tirelessly with compassion to advocate for our humanitarian issues; homelessness, addictions and our vets to name a few while remaining committed to being a good steward of Oregon’s natural resources.

I apologize that this letter is long, I feel so strongly that there is so much to fight for. With your help we can take our state back and turn it around to be a beautiful and vibrant state where Oregonians thrive.

As your congresswoman I promise to represent our values and constitutional freedoms for future generations. I would be honored to serve as your representative. I appreciate your vote and any contribution that you would feel comfortable with to help us win this race.

Thank you so much and God Bless you and your family,

Amy Ryan Courser
Republican Nominee for Congress, OR-05
Former City Councilwoman of Keizer, OR
Small Business Owner
Wife and Mother
Patriot and Conservative
Will you help me win back our Republican seat in Congress?

Please donate $25, $50, $75, $100, $250, $500, $1,000, or more to help restore Common Sense Leadership Oregonians Deserve! (https://secure.anedot.com/amy-ryan-courser-for-congress/donate-to-amy?utm_source=Amy+Ryan+Courser+for+Congress&utm_campaign=856c60ea22-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2020_08_14_04_10_COPY_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_0625c183a9-856c60ea22-221104281)
DONATE TODAY! (https://secure.anedot.com/amy-ryan-courser-for-congress/donate-to-amy?utm_source=Amy+Ryan+Courser+for+Congress&utm_campaign=856c60ea22-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2020_08_14_04_10_COPY_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_0625c183a9-856c60ea22-221104281)

Women Speak Out PAC (WSO PAC) is a nonconnected independent expenditure-only political committee (i.e., a federal "Super PAC") that is registered with the Federal Election Commission and is exempt from federal taxation under section 527 of the Internal Revenue Code. WSO PAC's spending is independent; it does not make contributions to, or coordinate its spending with, any candidates or political parties. WSO PAC may accept unlimited contributions from any source, including individuals, political committees, and corporations, but may not accept contributions from federal contractors or foreign nationals (except individuals who are not citizens of the United States but who are lawfully admitted for permanent residence). Federal law requires WSO PAC to use its best efforts to collect and report the name, mailing address, occupation, and name of employer of each individual whose contribution(s) exceed $200 in a calendar year. The IRS does not allow contributions to WSO PAC to be deducted as charitable contributions for federal income tax purposes.

body:
Millions more families are struggling to put food on the table and make rent -- while more billionaires are gobbling up more and more wealth. It's appalling. But let's be clear: this isn't happen | | | [](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/285251e2/45c30650/1c67d142b/66e8bf09/3344918718/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVm1hWEp6ZEc1aGJXVWxKUT09IjoiIiwiSlNWc1lYTjBibUZ0WlNVbCI6IiIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MzI2In0%3D/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://elizabethwarren.com?source=em-header&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&zip=18326")

Take a look at these two recent headlines, from the New York Times and CNN: [](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/285251e2/45c30650/1c67d142b/66e8bf08/3344918718/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsImUzc2dkWEpzSUgxOSI6IndkLW9jdDIwLXdlZWtseSIsImUzc2djbVZtWTI5a1pTQjlmUT09IjoiRU1XMDlGX0VHUl9FV0RfRV8yMDIwMTAyMF9WMVMxX1AifQ%3D%3D/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://secure.elizabethwarren.com/donate/wd-oct20-weekly?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=EMW09F_EGR_EWD_E_20201020_V1S1_P") [](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/285251e2/45c30650/1c67d142b/66e8bf08/3344918718/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsImUzc2dkWEpzSUgxOSI6IndkLW9jdDIwLXdlZWtseSIsImUzc2djbVZtWTI5a1pTQjlmUT09IjoiRU1XMDlGX0VHUl9FV0RfRV8yMDIwMTAyMF9WMVMxX1AifQ%3D%3D/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://secure.elizabethwarren.com/donate/wd-oct20-weekly?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=EMW09F_EGR_EWD_E_20201020_V1S1_P") Millions more families are struggling to put food on the table and make rent -- while more billionaires are gobbling up more and more wealth.

It's appalling. But let's be clear: this isn't happening by accident.

This was a choice -- a choice made by Donald Trump, Mitch McConnell, and all of the Republicans in Washington who've blocked real relief to working people for months and months during this crisis.

And there is only one way to change this: **we need to elect Democrats who believe in bold reform up and down the ballot this November.**

We can deliver relief to struggling families, make billionaires and giant corporations pay their fair share, and put people -- not just the rich and powerful -- first as we dig our way out of this crisis. But it's only possible if we fight side by side.

**[There are only 14 days left until Election Day. It's the final sprint. If you can make a donation at this time, please chip in $2 or whatever you can to help elect champions for working people across the country this November and beyond.](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/285251e2/45c30650/1c67d142b/66e8bf08/3344918718/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsImUzc2dkWEpzSUgxOSI6IndkLW9jdDIwLXdlZWtseSIsImUzc2djbVZtWTI5a1pTQjlmUT09IjoiRU1XMDlGX0VHUl9FV0RfRV8yMDIwMTAyMF9WMVMxX1AifQ%3D%3D/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://secure.elizabethwarren.com/donate/wd-oct20-weekly?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=EMW09F_EGR_EWD_E_20201020_V1S1_P")**

Thanks for being a part of this,

Elizabeth

We'll miss you, but you can always [unsubscribe](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/285251e2/45c30650/1c67d142b/66e8bf55/3344918718/VEsFAA/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://act.elizabethwarren.com/page/unsubscribe?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com").
clean_body: Millions more families are struggling to put food on the table and make rent -- while more billionaires are gobbling up more and more wealth. It's appalling. But let's be clear: this isn't happen | | | "" Take a look at these two recent headlines, from the New York Times and CNN: "" "" Millions more families are struggling to put food on the table and make rent -- while more billionaires are gobbling up more and more wealth. It's appalling. But let's be clear: this isn't happening by accident. This was a choice -- a choice made by Donald Trump, Mitch McConnell, and all of the Republicans in Washington who've blocked real relief to working people for months and months during this crisis. And there is only one way to change this: we need to elect Democrats who believe in bold reform up and down the ballot this November. We can deliver relief to struggling families, make billionaires and giant corporations pay their fair share, and put people -- not just the rich and powerful -- first as we dig our way out of this crisis. But it's only possible if we fight side by side. "" Thanks for being a part of this, Elizabeth | "" | | | "" | "" | "" | "" | "" | "" ---|---|---|---|---|--- | Paid for by Warren Democrats All content (C) 2020 Warren Democrats, All Rights Reserved PO Box 171375, Boston, MA 02117

name: Laura Loomer
subject: The real difference
body:
There’s a noticeable difference between my supporters and my opponent’s supporters
| | | [](https://em.lauraloomerforcongress.com/ga/click/2-561017072-4395-398417-937860-5253682-a77d6b50ad-4db26dfd3f)
Patriot,

[](https://em.lauraloomerforcongress.com/ga/click/2-561017072-4395-398417-937860-5253681-0f897b93a8-4db26dfd3f) There’s a noticeable difference between my supporters and my opponent’s supporters:
* Mine are real, hard-working American patriots.

* Lois Frankel’s are Washington political hacks like **Nancy Pelosi, who personally donated thousands of dollars** to prop up her failing campaign.

If you believe that the American people—not the Washington establishment should pick their leaders, [**I need you to pitch in $10 to help this campaign defeat Lois Frankel**](https://em.lauraloomerforcongress.com/ga/click/2-561017072-4395-398417-937860-5253682-a77d6b50ad-4db26dfd3f).

[**Please make your most generous donation of $10, $25, or even $50 now.**](https://em.lauraloomerforcongress.com/ga/click/2-561017072-4395-398417-937860-5253681-0f897b93a8-4db26dfd3f)

Lois has been in politics longer than I’ve been alive... and she’s literally the worst Swamp Monster that Washington has to offer.

For years, Lois has cruised to re-election with hardly any opposition.

This year, **she’s fighting for her political life**.

She can’t rely on actual voter enthusiasm, so instead, she’s getting a bailout from her wealthy, well-connected allies in Washington.

Let me be blunt: **Nancy Pelosi only whips out her own checkbook if you’re in deep, deep trouble as a candidate**.

Nancy Pelosi just donated to Lois Frankel, which means they are terrified of my upcoming victory.

Meanwhile, our campaign is driving real momentum, energy, and support, because we represent the people of Florida, not the politicians in Washington.

**We have everything we need to win... except the financial resources to finally break the back of Lois Frankel’s Democratic machine.**

[**Will you help me keep surging in the final days of the race, by pitching in $10, $25, or even $50 right away?**](https://em.lauraloomerforcongress.com/ga/click/2-561017072-4395-398417-937860-5253681-0f897b93a8-4db26dfd3f)

Please pitch in now.

Thanks for your help!

Laura Loomer

name: Alek Skarlatos
subject: We missed our goal on Sunday
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Alek for Oregon
body:
We're short $3,000 right now - that's $3,000 we must find with only 14 days left in this race We are quickly running out of time to close the 5-point polling gap....... Don't want to receive our emails? [Unsubscribe here.](http://links.alekskarlatosforcongress.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=7e7d86e0b42141418fdbf0bb715c41e9&_s=42481e1ccc8848499fb715463ac1baf5&_t=-9mDNR9cl2H1FFiXSeIg2i2U0iFJ6LE7NRxXLE5jNSbLHUzIiGOglfxDIw1Q-a4TNrUzEn8O_MmApJdLhI0Gi5koYEYDUL8KGKPhah5uUFQNypuRZR-tS6wMjBp4asxuvkpOVlvAdDiVdRuID1c5dbAQ4V8m7KTsUdAyUH9giXk%3D) | [](http://links.alekskarlatosforcongress.com/u/click?_t=7e7d86e0b42141418fdbf0bb715c41e9&_m=42481e1ccc8848499fb715463ac1baf5&_e=h8fsYnLm9ZixZemuL8dGOm-DZaf-FHAxi6ykfJf95SIGrFhWmMRSlCMphtwP-5AqJW0Que49pYWiiaa1MFbbi2L1XQzZpQjGFlxI8TMY6eKN12cQTN9iJwfveYs7sNtDPZTiW5lXXfa_ZBS-HQCRPLpgv-C4UhoaQwLj-1DONYdQUMfsoyhg9GWgMHjzfRfYV6TkIh1gITI_jLOXXzbvwfwq4rIsXFVetHu3xE40NxtY0u8u1jtufq6ON3Nw2i4-LLZVy08peTkTNJLLNZNYCuTJxJEd18Yqf70gJwNxUxBlqyFKs9EYhvK9-f_BWpi7)
---

Peter,

I want to start this email off by saying thank you. I know it’s likely that if you have made a contribution to my campaign, then you have likely given to other campaigns as well. I just want you to know I consider myself lucky that you’ve chosen to support my campaign for Congress.

**[Now to my request for immediate help:](http://links.alekskarlatosforcongress.com/u/click?_t=7e7d86e0b42141418fdbf0bb715c41e9&_m=42481e1ccc8848499fb715463ac1baf5&_e=h8fsYnLm9ZixZemuL8dGOm-DZaf-FHAxi6ykfJf95SIGrFhWmMRSlCMphtwP-5AqJW0Que49pYWiiaa1MFbbi2L1XQzZpQjGFlxI8TMY6eJsxSrXUuxyilntr8iWPDaIOLch1AmyY6No_fJtny7ySfPI1rOM-jFPTXVlwXXVjBnLaoqp_23uk_m8r8lE1_RbnvNXMr0VOyZDOj2Y1jkTGhuo60zCDoQ1bK1zguB6kz6Il_-zyn4OmEvnSkaFzmPcBxL1cQkqite-vjMQo_cRPzzNrgvzJ1kCGvRuXJvffqBIXJtHxXp72UcoFoC-g1Hx)** as I’ve said to you in many emails before this one, I really do not like having to ask you for your financial help. That said, the movement that we have built together over this last year has one of the most powerful Democrat incumbents struggling to win a 18th term in the House. **As a sign of how close things are getting, my race was recently declared the most expensive in Oregon HISTORY.**

You might recall that over the weekend I set a goal to raise $20,000. **[Well, we fell $3,000 short](http://links.alekskarlatosforcongress.com/u/click?_t=7e7d86e0b42141418fdbf0bb715c41e9&_m=42481e1ccc8848499fb715463ac1baf5&_e=h8fsYnLm9ZixZemuL8dGOm-DZaf-FHAxi6ykfJf95SIGrFhWmMRSlCMphtwP-5AqJW0Que49pYWiiaa1MFbbi2L1XQzZpQjGFlxI8TMY6eKY6GaqfFyOmWpHwxbtvZYRT-P1olFlS0xXE_ADYIdsO3ZVtJcmjZFuNle7NyzK-sr-2BdKt--TAKGmk3alSjcTZKRZv2jzy1PRJOWWjD7rFg7kWF_zF7SBBw52cWn3t8-q-mCciqkb5_FKGyXwPOD5xlkFAG946Q7Kj1FI4kCA8MxJWlLaVxPBgMjA4x0tUrLqmDwaaYIodwZyzXL4UCVm)**. That’s $3,000 we don’t’ have to spend on persuasion ads; it’s $3,000 that I don’t have to defend myself against the attack ads targeting me in the final two weeks of this race.

We’re _**so close**_ to retiring the co-sponsor of the Green New Deal, so **[coming up short of any fundraising goals- like we did last weekend - is not something that we can afford to have happen at this late stage of the game](http://links.alekskarlatosforcongress.com/u/click?_t=7e7d86e0b42141418fdbf0bb715c41e9&_m=42481e1ccc8848499fb715463ac1baf5&_e=h8fsYnLm9ZixZemuL8dGOm-DZaf-FHAxi6ykfJf95SIGrFhWmMRSlCMphtwP-5AqJW0Que49pYWiiaa1MFbbi2L1XQzZpQjGFlxI8TMY6eLclpTG2MnSuaY4NNMmk1In1CA2SMVPWGQkyuqfWcAPpcma1Rcz4bVMokuI58Qw_A-hNZ3V8Ifgc5OhV5yxSfAOymq2n6wXiutCLbTMAAmlz-3GiNoMlW2LbTcPpsxNRDsrEkyIzNheL5OGsPZu44RqKl0haXMn59u9zkMUSGevI5V_GFVLV1fUnQJV4srymvPREE5nJKtYD6mnQ4ZEB1a4)**.

clean_body: We're short $3,000 right now - that's $3,000 we must find with only 14 days left in this race We are quickly running out of time to close the 5-point polling gap....... Don't want to receive our emails? | Peter, I want to start this email off by saying thank you. I know it’s likely that if you have made a contribution to my campaign, then you have likely given to other campaigns as well. I just want you to know I consider myself lucky that you’ve chosen to support my campaign for Congress. as I’ve said to you in many emails before this one, I really do not like having to ask you for your financial help. That said, the movement that we have built together over this last year has one of the most powerful Democrat incumbents struggling to win a 18th term in the House. As a sign of how close things are getting, my race was recently declared the most expensive in Oregon HISTORY. You might recall that over the weekend I set a goal to raise $20,000. . That’s $3,000 we don’t’ have to spend on persuasion ads; it’s $3,000 that I don’t have to defend myself against the attack ads targeting me in the final two weeks of this race. We’re so close to retiring the co-sponsor of the Green New Deal, so . Will you help me make up the difference today? | With the election 14 days from today and voters already casting their ballots, I can’t afford to not have that $3,000 in the bank. If I come out of this race victorious on November 3rd, it’s going to be in no small part because of your generosity and that of conservatives like you from all around this great nation. THANK YOU, Alek Skarlatos Republican for Congress Follow Alek On Social Media | ---|--- | Paid for by Alek for Oregon

clean_body: We achieved this because of YOU. | Friend, I want to thank you from the bottom of my heart for all of your support during this campaign. Thanks to patriots like you, we outraised my Democrat opponent Lizzie Fletcher by more than 2:1. But now, she’s hiding from her disastrous record of voting with Pelosi 99% of the time by refusing to debate me. Now that our race is STATISTICALLY TIED, we need to double down on our fundraising advantage to ensure we get our message out to voters as Fletcher hides from the public. My opponent is more concerned with winning favor from Pelosi than serving the people of Texas, Friend. That’s why she continues to hide from the people she claims to serve -- she knows real Texans would never stand for her anti-police, anti-small business, and anti-energy record. I’m determined to show voters the truth about her, but we need to keep fighting if we’re going to get our message out to every single voter in this critical Texas district. Our team is giving this final stretch everything we’ve got to keep our momentum going, but now that we’re tied, we need to push even harder. Thank you, Wesley Hunt Captain, U.S. Army Aviation Branch Official Republican Nominee for Congress 1707 1/2 Post Oak Blvd. #525 Houston, TX 77056 Paid for by Hunt for Congress. body:
Help me hold them accountable.
| [](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001Dm2VFkZCBaqp_BHHZdcvKYR_VXy2ub8Ex25DlXDxbkubK_flUmSj7p50CTq_clL-k5jiPu1bbv2wUH95xH2ET27s9thscq6U0QaUPrfuAZUw6ava-L5l4SqehdsYTLOlVMPuBy_Si0vjdItwERTMS1tnFRkEd1q_BCZBkymDXcV_50iUXygjzOpe1AC9zYZhmasmDAlA0pJBspL3Vd03G_ui1K4a3pSSfvSZYrdKjBbRIQOCUNvxG_lkYBjcTI89cIDFAsaDy-g3bCteIVuGQQvncDwokzhhTq0z1JYvMpkDKIpC0oxxVPtL4Ef68wIH&c=DmaGU4CT5sDPq9ldqyU6BOuU98z0ntv74qgsHn63A809H0H52DMh2g==&ch=B7cPWtorkhvma_4HQ6R9HoU6NRUa_sAn5WqDQkTCghqG7GOGsIhl0Q==)
---
Friend,
---
The Chinese Communist Party's propaganda outlets are publishing hit pieces attacking me for standing up to their lies that fueled a global health pandemic and their economic cheating that hurts American workers and businesses.
---
I'm not scared of the Communist Party. I know holding China accountable is the right thing to do because the Chinese Communist Party is the greatest long-term threat to America.
---
But what _does_ worry me is that Nancy Peloisi and my radical, socialist opponent could buy this election and turn a blind eye to the malign agenda of the Communist Party.
---
_Now, I need your help ensuring victory on November 3, so that I can continue to hold the Chinese government accountable and stop them from ripping off our country._
---
[**Please make a contribution in these final two weeks of the election to defend this critical Texas district so that I can continue to STAND UP to the Chinese Communist Party.**](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001Dm2VFkZCBaqp_BHHZdcvKYR_VXy2ub8Ex25DlXDxbkubK_flUmSj7p50CTq_clL-k5jiPu1bbv2wUH95xH2ET27s9thscq6U0QaUPrfuAZUw6ava-L5l4SqehdsYTLOlVMPuBy_Si0vjdItwERTMS1tnFRkEd1q_BCZBkymDXcV_50iUXygjzOpe1AC9zYZhmasmDAlA0pJBspL3Vd03G_ui1K4a3pSSfvSZYrdKjBbRIQOCUNvxG_lkYBjcTI89cIDFAsaDy-g3bCteIVuGQQvncDwokzhhTq0z1JYvMpkDKIpC0oxxVPtL4Ef68wIH&c=DmaGU4CT5sDPq9ldqyU6BOuU98z0ntv74qgsHn63A809H0H52DMh2g==&ch=B7cPWtorkhvma_4HQ6R9HoU6NRUa_sAn5WqDQkTCghqG7GOGsIhl0Q==)
---
My socialist opponent would rather criticize the United States than say a single bad word about the Chinese Communist Party.
---
**I will _always_ stand up for American workers. It's time to end America's economic reliance on China and bring our factories and jobs back home.**
---
But in order to continue holding the Chinese government accountable in the halls of Congress, we must first ensure victory here in Texas, and defend our critical district from the radical Left.
---
[**So please, make a contribution today to help me stand up to Communist China and STOP a radical socialist from becoming our next Congressman.**](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001Dm2VFkZCBaqp_BHHZdcvKYR_VXy2ub8Ex25DlXDxbkubK_flUmSj7p50CTq_clL-k5jiPu1bbv2wUH95xH2ET27s9thscq6U0QaUPrfuAZUw6ava-L5l4SqehdsYTLOlVMPuBy_Si0vjdItwERTMS1tnFRkEd1q_BCZBkymDXcV_50iUXygjzOpe1AC9zYZhmasmDAlA0pJBspL3Vd03G_ui1K4a3pSSfvSZYrdKjBbRIQOCUNvxG_lkYBjcTI89cIDFAsaDy-g3bCteIVuGQQvncDwokzhhTq0z1JYvMpkDKIpC0oxxVPtL4Ef68wIH&c=DmaGU4CT5sDPq9ldqyU6BOuU98z0ntv74qgsHn63A809H0H52DMh2g==&ch=B7cPWtorkhvma_4HQ6R9HoU6NRUa_sAn5WqDQkTCghqG7GOGsIhl0Q==)
---
Thank you,

I'm not scared of the Communist Party. I know holding China accountable is the right thing to do because the Chinese Communist Party is the greatest long-term threat to America. But what does worry me is that Nancy Peloisi and my radical, socialist opponent could buy this election and turn a blind eye to the malign agenda of the Communist Party. Now, I need your help ensuring victory on November 3, so that I can continue to hold the Chinese government accountable and stop them from ripping off our country. == My socialist opponent would rather criticize the United States than say a single bad word about the Chinese Communist Party. body:
| | |
---
| | Friends,

We are just 2 weeks away from election day. Early voting options are now available to voters, and the Democrats are using absentee ballots to their advantage. Republicans must beat them at their own game, which is why the Kansas GOP has created [this resource](https://traceymann.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=60a16ea89a176679a5f31366c&id=6e8b4fab6f&e=a9d1410029) to help you _**vote early, safely, and in-person.**_

---

---
|
---
| In the critical times we are living in, it is eminent that we elect conservative leaders on every level. Our team is working closely with fellow Republicans across the ballot to ensure Kansas stays red. [_**Will you help us?**_](https://traceymann.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=60a16ea89a176679a5f31366c&id=9ebcf796b6&e=a9d1410029)
Your [donation](https://traceymann.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=60a16ea89a176679a5f31366c&id=4887d40fef&e=a9d1410029) will aid our efforts fighting for rural, conservative values from the state house to the Senate.

And continue to [support](https://traceymann.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=60a16ea89a176679a5f31366c&id=391efb95a7&e=a9d1410029) your Republican candidates.

Tracey is dedicated to the constituents of the First District and will continue to fight for the conservative values you hold dear in Washington DC. Now, we are asking you to fight for Tracey. [_**Vote early. Vote Republican. Vote in-person.**_](https://traceymann.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=60a16ea89a176679a5f31366c&id=47ae5d6ae9&e=a9d1410029)

name: Team Warner
subject: two weeks away.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Mark Warner
body:
Election Day is two weeks away. Do you have a plan to vote?
|
---

| | Dear Derek --

**_Election Day is two weeks away. Do you have a plan to vote?_**

We've got more options than ever to cast our ballots this year in Virginia. And whether you're planning to vote by mail, vote early in-person, or vote in-person on Election Day, it's important that you do get out and vote.

Studies show that folks are much more likely to actually get out and vote if they have a plan. So if you haven't thought about how you're going to cast your ballot yet (we get it, you're busy!), head over to **[iwillvote.com](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85da3a/53d9897e/554b188d/1c88fb30/3075744575/VEsH/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "http://iwillvote.com")** to get started.

One thing to note: if you're planning to vote by mail with a no-excuse absentee ballot, the deadline to request your ballot is **this Friday, October 23rd at 5:00 PM ET.** If you're planning to vote early in person, you've got more time -- early voting in person goes until October 31st this year.

No matter how you're planning to vote, or who you're planning to vote for, the most important thing is that you do cast your ballot. Your vote is your voice. It's your chance to speak out for the change you want to see in the Commonwealth and in the country.

-- Team Warner

P.S. If you've already voted, THANK YOU! If you're looking for another way to support Team Warner in the home stretch, **[consider making a donation to help us reach as many Virginia voters as possible in these last two weeks of the campaign.](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85da3a/53d9897e/554b188d/1c88fb3f/3075744575/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6Ijg4OCJ9/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/warner-reach?refcode=20201020_f_1_nd__888__&refcode2=ask1&amount=5")**

| [CONTRIBUTE](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85da3a/53d9897e/554b188d/1c88fb3e/3075744575/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6Ijg4OCJ9/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/warner-reach?refcode=20201020_f_1_nd__888__&refcode2=cont&amount=5")
---

|
---

Friends of Mark Warner
1490-5A Quarterpath Road #213
Williamsburg, VA 23185

[Unsubscribe](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85da3a/53d9897e/554b188d/1c88fb3d/3075744575/VEsC/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://act.markwarnerva.com/unsubscribe")

Peter,

My opponent, Jackie Gordon, is lying to the people of Long Island. She is pretending to be a moderate who fights for the middle class and stands with the people of Long Island. **But does that hold up to her actual record?**

_Here are the facts about Jackie Gordon's “moderate” record: _
**Andrew Garbarino**
**Jackie Gordon**
✅ I’m endorsed by dozens of local and national Republican leaders like Congressman Pete King, Newt Gingrich and Kevin McCarthy!
✅ I’m not afraid to Back the Blue, and that’s why Law Enforcement groups overwhelmingly endorse me!
✅ I’ll fight to make healthcare and prescription drugs cheaper and work better for the people!
✅**I’ve never voted to raise taxes on the people of New York, and I never will!**
❌ Jackie Gordon was gladly endorsed by Ayanna Pressley, a close _**SOCIALIST**_ ally of Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez.
❌ Jackie Gordon has refused to comment on the _**“DEFUND THE POLICE”**_ movement, while the party she’s a part of actively supports it!
❌ Jackie Gordon supports taking away your private healthcare and replacing it with a _**GOVERNMENT-MANDATED**_ system!
❌ Jackie Gordon voted to _**RAISE TAXES**_ on the people of Long Island while giving herself a pay raise.
[**Defend Long Island from Jackie Gordonl**](http://links.garbarinoforny.com/u/click?_t=7b77702d6650435d80b420c1495e37a8&_m=368d572508124ce2aa7c2975f8d92118&_e=5YsG7W4q0cw4hOASrChy3mqoRdrC-50CyEjKPuTNL58wUfD9XQcqUgwhdynozPznoAhW1eCxjWeYBNj4IAFi-Ywq0I2Y0cFmPhwYjVXsegnD1WZwIj3oZEIrsVEV6aUNToIeQBA86KhxvSt4a9yrQW6xSJKC7YKlG1S5RhgKjbthe1WcuqIIkDDuabovHTtOLD4HV_ltCVBxhepIuHuF2MsFz5jG5ue2T2o25YOPWx67CQZG1iQjuKUi15yTb6nLmQKqFgjpEdyspi4OPOmuhbPDzNYScmdDvjBGkf8NgaUIsaE1_JtUmkGpCTNzgNwR9_cxDTnQq7Gvl-JnyS8fll5rQLU3Go41d1Rlt_g92BON47HzVjkhn8tif4T94ufWjsPHuDurXtU1DM3Ilg2tzdOWXm6FTdAHVfwx8USF8vQtdjKJMeBf_2OSwMOks7ye)
Do you now see what’s at stake this November? body:
Friends, We have just **TWO WEEKS LEFT BEFORE ELECTION DAY** , and my radical opponent Tom O’Halleran is trying to _steal this election at the last minute_ by combining forces with Mark Kelly. He’s told his supporters that Captain Mark Kelly’s campaign is **bankrolling hundreds of thousands of dollars** into this crucial race. Tom O’Halleran might have high-up backers to prop up his campaign, but I depend on grassroots supporters like you to keep up my fight for Arizona values! clean_body: My account was suspended. | == Friend, I've been running ads on Facebook that have been effectively turning voters away from Charlie Crist. But ever since I ran an ad about the legal action I'm taking against Twitter for its failure to report an in-kind donation to Crist's campaign with the FEC, my account has been SUSPENDED. That means for the time being, I can no longer run ads on Facebook for the FINAL 2 weeks. With Charlie Crist spending $3 million on ads, I need your urgent help funding our TV ad fund to get our winning message out to voters. == == == Facebook's suspension of my ads account helps PROVE that liberal social media giants are, in fact, trying to influence the 2020 elections to hurt Republicans and help Democrats win. But as we saw in the primary, their attempts to silence and censor me completely backfired. We've received a historic amount of grassroots contributions from patriots who believe in our campaign to drain the swamp and restore power to the people. Now that we are so close to the finish line, liberal giants are doing everything in their control to try and destroy us. But as an Air Force veteran, I never give up and I always fight back. == Thank you, == Anna Paulina Luna Air Force Veteran Official Republican Nominee for Congress (FL-13) PAID FOR BY ANNA PAULINA LUNA FOR CONGRESS PO Box 23064, St. Petersburg, FL 33742 Military images and information do not imply endorsement by DOD [Department of Defense] or any service branch. | | ANNA PAULINA LUNA FOR CONGRESS | PO Box 23064, St. Petersburg, FL 33742 | | Sent by mailto:action@conservativenewsalert.net powered by

name: Jerry Carl
subject: Vicious videotaped attack
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jerry Carl for Congress
body:
Our men & women in uniform need our support. Read more >>
[ ](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/e74187f3c92098b17c94c760ea83e7c0/32613/e3333dd820a454c9/4ae0ecf85ec93174c3d6b838967d376c/32613) Fellow Conservative, I just read about this incident on TheBlaze.com. It’s yet another APPALLING story of law enforcement coming under attack. A North Carolina police officer was severely beaten over the weekend and ultimately airlifted to a hospital as he attempted to make an arrest. Onlookers laughed and mocked him... as this vicious attack was videotaped and livestreamed on Facebook. This is BEYOND DISGUSTING... I’m outraged, and I’m sure you are too. Unfortunately, this is no isolated incident. Police officers across America are being targeted and attacked at an increasing rate. Line of duty deaths have spiked upward drastically over the last six months. **The left-wing anarchists AND the thug criminal class are emboldened**. It’s no wonder why. The pandering left-wing politicians – in city government, in Congress, and at the top of the Democratic ticket this year – have FANNED THE FLAMES of this anti-police insanity with their calls to defund law enforcement! Enough is enough. Take a stand for law and order. **[🚨 Stand with me, with Coach Tuberville, and with President Trump to BACK THE BLUE!](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/e74187f3c92098b17c94c760ea83e7c0/32613/e3333dd820a454c9/8bc14b8583bd1340c3d6b838967d376c/32613)** We have two weeks to go until Election Day in the most consequential election of our lifetime. We need your help to defeat the unhinged radical left here in Alabama. Police unions nationwide support President Trump, because they know he has their back. So do I... and I’m eager for the fight to Back the Blue in Congress and call out these anti-police politicians for endangering our men and women in law enforcement. **[Help us close strong to WIN. Rush a $5, $10, $25, or $50 contribution today](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/e74187f3c92098b17c94c760ea83e7c0/32613/e3333dd820a454c9/056ff7926824d8fcc3d6b838967d376c/32613)**. \- Jerry [**DONATE HERE >>**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/e74187f3c92098b17c94c760ea83e7c0/32613/e3333dd820a454c9/eeb7397da39ccf37c3d6b838967d376c/32613) | | [](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/e74187f3c92098b17c94c760ea83e7c0/32613/e3333dd820a454c9/1046dfe287f7d8b9c3d6b838967d376c/32613) | [](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/e74187f3c92098b17c94c760ea83e7c0/32613/e3333dd820a454c9/c2ff69070fcc73e9c3d6b838967d376c/32613)

Friend,
---
I’m going to be honest with you. I’m extremely worried.
---
Democrats have returned 384,000 more ballots than Republicans so far in Florida, and with November 3rd just around the corner, we’re running out of time to close the gap.
---
President Trump is counting on **every congressional district** in the Sunshine State to do their part, and the more patriots we can get to the polls, **the more votes we have for the President and his trusted allies.**
---

clean_body: Together, we can help them catch up | Friend, I’m going to be honest with you. I’m extremely worried. Democrats have returned 384,000 more ballots than Republicans so far in Florida, and with November 3rd just around the corner, we’re running out of time to close the gap. President Trump is counting on every congressional district in the Sunshine State to do their part, and the more patriots we can get to the polls, the more votes we have for the President and his trusted allies. There is no way we can send the President back to the White House for four more years if he doesn’t win Florida, Friend. Our district is supposed to be a powerhouse for him, but with the massive ballot gap, I’m afraid we might fall behind. That’s why I need all hands on deck to mobilize conservative voters in my district -- because every true Republican I get to the polls isn’t just a vote for me, it’s another trusted vote for President Trump in our must-win state. I’m working to close the ballot gap and WIN by November 3rd, but I can’t do it alone. The President, our great state of Florida, and the whole country are depending on you. Now, let’s make sure we don’t let them down. Thank you, Rep. Byron Donalds Official Republican Nominee for Congress FL-19 Paid for by Byron Donalds for Congress. 2430 Vanderbilt Beach Road, Ste 108 PMB 260, Naples, FL 34108

name: Abigail Spanberger
subject: I hope I made you proud
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Spanberger for Congress
body:
| [ ](https://act.myngp.com/el/Cfop-WG7xpVXIRT9PpwhaN2l9TYzDQBtaBuHf4p1ASw=/9mh9niLd7BM-bLSIBrfk56vMXIpHWSpOygHpRoQ2byY=?refcode=BLU-SPAN-20201020-1-EM&amount=25)
---
| Peter,

I hope I made you proud during tonight's debate.

If you watched, I hope you knew that I was fighting for you, your family, and our Central Virginia communities.

So much - from protections for people with pre-existing conditions, to our economic recovery from this recession, to ensuring access to meaningful opportunity in our region - is on the ballot in this election.

**_[If you're ready to seize this moment, please make a contribution to my re-election campaign right now.](https://act.myngp.com/el/Cfop-WG7xpVXIRT9PpwhaN2l9TYzDQBtaBuHf4p1ASw=/9mh9niLd7BM-bLSIBrfk56vMXIpHWSpOygHpRoQ2byY=?refcode=BLU-SPAN-20201020-1-EM&amount=25)_**

Tonight, I shared several of the stories I've heard from Virginians that are driving the fights I'm taking on in Congress, like pushing for COVID-19 relief, lowering drug costs, expanding broadband internet access, supporting small businesses, and strengthening our national security.

**[In contrast, my opponent spent most of the debate echoing talking points pushed by the outside Republican super PACs who back him.](https://act.myngp.com/el/Cfop-WG7xpVXIRT9PpwhaN2l9TYzDQBtaBuHf4p1ASw=/9mh9niLd7BM-bLSIBrfk56vMXIpHWSpOygHpRoQ2byY=?refcode=BLU-SPAN-20201020-1-EM&amount=25)**

These same super PACs have been pouring millions of dollars into our district, hoping to spend enough to discredit my strong record of fighting for VA-07.

They're doing everything they can to stop our clear momentum. We can't let them do that, not in these final weeks of the campaign.

**_[Your support has never been more important. So I'm asking, Peter, can you contribute now to help us finish strong from this moment all the way through to Election Day?](https://act.myngp.com/el/Cfop-WG7xpVXIRT9PpwhaN2l9TYzDQBtaBuHf4p1ASw=/9mh9niLd7BM-bLSIBrfk56vMXIpHWSpOygHpRoQ2byY=?refcode=BLU-SPAN-20201020-1-EM&amount=25)_**
---
| [CONTRIBUTE ](https://act.myngp.com/el/Cfop-WG7xpVXIRT9PpwhaN2l9TYzDQBtaBuHf4p1ASw=/9mh9niLd7BM-bLSIBrfk56vMXIpHWSpOygHpRoQ2byY=?refcode=BLU-SPAN-20201020-1-EM&amount=25)
---
Thank you,

_Abigail_

* * *
| | [ ](https://act.myngp.com/el/Cfop-WG7xpVXIRT9PpwhaN2l9TYzDQBtaBuHf4p1ASw=/9mh9niLd7BM-bLSIBrfk56vMXIpHWSpOygHpRoQ2byY=?refcode=BLU-SPAN-20201020-1-EM&amount=25)

name: Elissa Slotkin
subject: My personal ask to you
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Elissa Slotkin for Congress
body:
We're in the final stretch of this race, and I couldn't be prouder of the work we're doing to reach voters in all corners of the 8th District. This campaign has certainly proven to be radically di Elissa Slotkin for Congress | | | |
---

| | Friend, We're in the final stretch of this race, and I couldn't be prouder of the work we're doing to reach voters in all corners of the 8th District. This campaign has certainly proven to be radically different than we envisioned. I know I'm not alone when I say I miss the energy of a big rally and the feel of a crowded campaign office. **But just as businesses and families across the country have done, our campaign has adapted to meet the moment.** Our team has recreated that sense of community by doing phone-banking over Zoom, contactless canvassing, and by keeping volunteers connected to one another over social media. We've also held in-person events, and have opted for mostly outdoor venues while keeping crowds distanced and attendance carefully managed. Nonetheless, I believe these events are still meaningful, and allowed us to reach thousands of other viewers through our livestream. There was certainly no playbook for campaigning during a pandemic. And I'm proud of the creativity and ingenuity that Team Slotkin has demonstrated. **I 'm so thankful for your support. We truly couldn't run this re-imagined campaign without you. ** But there is still work to be done. **We must ensure that Democrats win up and down the ballot in Michigan in 2020.** That's why I'm asking if you'd consider making one last contribution to our campaign, to help us cross the finish line and win here in Michigan's 8th. [**If you gave some time ago, please consider doing the same now for this final push.**](https://secure.elissaforcongress.com/page/m/7ec72f26/4e5e63e6/7470703e/6d2afaea/3920663746/VEsH/?g=sbLwD1Nw52hePREDDGBmRZA "http://secure.actblue.com/donate/slotkinq42020?refcode=em_fr_2020.10.20_reactive_ts_all") | [ contribute ](https://secure.elissaforcongress.com/page/m/7ec72f26/4e5e63e6/7470703e/6d2afaeb/3920663746/VEsE/?g=sbLwD1Nw52hePREDDGBmRZA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/slotkinq42020?refcode=em_fr_2020.10.20_reactive_ts_all")
---

Thanks for considering, and thank you for all of your support!

Elissa

---
| | |
---

---
About Elissa
Elissa Slotkin proudly represents Michigan's 8th district in Congress. Keep up with Elissa and the latest from the campaign trail on [Facebook](https://secure.elissaforcongress.com/page/m/7ec72f26/4e5e63e6/7470703e/6d2afae8/3920663746/VEsF/?g=sbLwD1Nw52hePREDDGBmRZA "https://www.facebook.com/elissaslotkinforcongress") and [ Twitter.](https://secure.elissaforcongress.com/page/m/7ec72f26/4e5e63e6/7470703e/6d2afae9/3920663746/VEsC/?g=sbLwD1Nw52hePREDDGBmRZA "https://twitter.com/ElissaSlotkin")

name: Wesley Hunt for Congress
subject: Rep. Kevin Brady Joins Hunt for Small Business Roundtable
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Hunt for Congress
body:
**Representative Kevin Brady Joins Wesley Hunt for Small Business Roundtable**

Houston, TX - Today, Representative Kevin Brady, Ranking Member of the House Ways and Means Committee, joined Wesley Hunt, the Republican nominee for Texas' 7th Congressional District, and a coalition of local small business owners for a roundtable discussion. Entrepreneurs and employers throughout the 7th District participated in the conversation to discuss opportunities and challenges in today's economic climate.

_"From our neighborhood gyms to our restaurants and theaters, our businesses are hurting right now. And when Democrats throw around reckless and unfeasible plans to upend our healthcare industry, raise our taxes, and play politics with Coronavirus relief, these are the people who suffer,”_ **said Hunt.** _“It’s the entrepreneurs who go the extra mile to improve their lives and the lives of their communities. They are the engines of progress in our community and they will play a critical role in helping Houston recover from this pandemic. I think our government should serve to empower these people, not the other way around. I am grateful these men and women took the time to meet with Ranking Member Brady and me this morning, and I will always fight to ensure they have an advocate in Congress."_
Hunt is a Houston native and battle-tested leader willing to stand up for the 7th Congressional District. While his opponent Lizzie Fletcher made Pelosi Speaker of the House and refuses to condemn the most liberal of Democratic priorities, Wesley is a problem solver who will work with both sides to bring results home to the 7th District.
###
****[CONTRIBUTE](http://links.wesleyfortexas.com/u/click?_t=fd5d6e7aa0334e7ebb096a39dc496016&_m=7dbb8e8ddecc49cf9c280bc4578dd7c3&_e=qmOHt38fJibozZVaemIwg3ek24WCN3mzoLVq1NDIA_22TwMpHQrpU3hlV8MRAmXPLaZUpREFCEEd1l6aMvKdf3tyEDmScnjEs_Zr9LE9DrUM03mLI-2fteQ4TUVzHgTgYVT0N4vJdVhl7araBnBFnEMHQ5MQ6LjkQ9uvqPNfFyBj_w0gK5QrGaGYqzCNH3EM3YlFfWzNqQmGMGG-jILLNs3myYsK9npt6CZDVssi3dq5NMHAIF5sC4ExajE7rYXZYKJwda-3iwCeOt527m3QWdQilOuaDSMVYM1lpkWumlY%3D)****

name: Bill Olson
subject: Drain the Swamp
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY WILLIAM OLSON FOR CONGRESS
body:
Bill Olson for Congress

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=gIhDOPwbjF6OuRU&b=WrqXxkyJdpYywF8zo6F67g

Hi Peter,

71%.

My Democrat opponent gets 71% of his money from Swamp political action committees- and that's who he is loyal to!

My name is Bill Olson, and I am a conservative Christian combat vet who dominated my primary and willwin alongside President Trump in my Florida swing district

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=gIhDOPwbjF6OuRU&b=WrqXxkyJdpYywF8zo6F67g
!

Part of the reason I won my primary is because I raised by far the most money in the field- and now I've mounted the stiffest Republican opposition Rep. Soto has ever faced!

I'll take my 4,000 individual donors over the 3/4 of his money raised by dirty, Swampy PACs anytime!

See, this is how we get the Swamp. Nancy Pelosi sells out to the Swamp, and strongarms PACs to give money to her loyal lieutenants.

Soto has been loyal; 95% voting with Pelosi. She says "jump!", and he answers "how high?"

If you wonder how we get bad policy like Obamacare, or impeachment, or any of Pelosi's other pet projects, this is why!

Let's take a look at where Rep. Soto gets some of his money, shall we?

-Most of his contributions come from the infamous dark money site ActBlue. This site funnelled millions in untraceable foreign contributions to Dem candidates over the last decade.

-Wall Street banks chipped in with a bunch, including foreign banks like UBS.

-Federal employees backed their champion with thousands.

-Big Pharma backed their Obamacare-loving champion, Darren Soto. In fact, nearly every single big Pharma company's PAC gave to Soto!

-Big unions, like SEIU, came up big for Soto as well!

Well, I'm not a Pelosi stooge. No one bought me off. I'm raising money, but I'm doing it the honest way- from patriots like you!

Image

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=gIhDOPwbjF6OuRU&b=WrqXxkyJdpYywF8zo6F67g

Think for a moment about everything you hate about the Swamp. All of that is present in liberal Darren Soto!

Image

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=gIhDOPwbjF6OuRU&b=WrqXxkyJdpYywF8zo6F67g

It's time to demand better! If you want leadership different from Pelosi.... if you hate the Swamp, if you want a Congress who will work with President Trump, then I need you right now!

Join my 4,000 patriots who want to drain the Swamp! I need your help to beat the far Left!

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=gIhDOPwbjF6OuRU&b=WrqXxkyJdpYywF8zo6F67g

Trump needs Florida, and Florida is close! My district is a key swing district that has been held by the Republicans this decade, and Trump needs it to swing Republican.

It's all on the line here. If I win, Pelosi won't be Speaker. If we win here, Trump will win Florida. This is it!

I need your help to stand up AGAINST Pelosi and the Swamp!

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=gIhDOPwbjF6OuRU&b=WrqXxkyJdpYywF8zo6F67g

Can I count on you for a donation

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=gIhDOPwbjF6OuRU&b=WrqXxkyJdpYywF8zo6F67g
today? We urgently need to stay up on TV in the Orlando area- and we need your help this week, immediately, to do that!

I'm going to make sure the radical Democrats like Biden and Soto lose BIG this year - with your help!

Let's get this done!

Image

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=gIhDOPwbjF6OuRU&b=WrqXxkyJdpYywF8zo6F67g

Bill Olson

Combat Veteran of Multiple Wars

Supports President Trump

Not a Career Politician

Hard Core Conservative Fighter

Image

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=gIhDOPwbjF6OuRU&b=WrqXxkyJdpYywF8zo6F67g

P.S. I really need your help today

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=gIhDOPwbjF6OuRU&b=WrqXxkyJdpYywF8zo6F67g
, so a conservative combat vet can retake this swing district that the Republicans held just earlier this decade. I can do this - WITH YOUR HELP!

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=gIhDOPwbjF6OuRU&b=WrqXxkyJdpYywF8zo6F67g
Thank you and God bless America! - Bill.

PAID FOR BY WILLIAM OLSON FOR CONGRESS

5 Halifax Ct
Marlton NJ 08053

If we win here, Trump will win Florida. This is it! I need your help to stand up AGAINST Pelosi and the Swamp! Can I count on you for a donation today? We urgently need to stay up on TV in the Orlando area- and we need your help this week, immediately, to do that! I'm going to make sure the radical Democrats like Biden and Soto lose BIG this year - with your help! Let's get this done! Image Bill Olson Combat Veteran of Multiple Wars Supports President Trump Not a Career Politician Hard Core Conservative Fighter Image P.S. I really need your help today , so a conservative combat vet can retake this swing district that the Republicans held just earlier this decade. I can do this - WITH YOUR HELP! Thank you and God bless America! - Bill. PAID FOR BY WILLIAM OLSON FOR CONGRESS Bill Olson is a retired member of the United States Army. name: Gina Raimondo
subject: Advice from an expert
body:
---
| | | | | |
---
| Hello friend,
Throughout this crisis, we've let our doctors and scientists lead our COVID-19 response. I've relied heavily on Dr. Nicole-Alexander Scott and the staff at the Rhode Island Department of Health (RIDOH) for advice on how we can combat the pandemic. So, with our case numbers currently at a crucial crossroads, I looked to one of RIDOH's leading physicians, Medical Director Dr. Jim McDonald, for some perspective. As usual, he did a great job explaining what this data means and how we can all make it a little easier to stay safe. You can watch that video [here](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=00189o3l3SpJOG1EE9yPEsJIkH9PTHOSsOfGxLpfYxSqxjT-eHOJux1W-eJbualm9jXXvyTYZto1GXrpsQT0AERVqhiVZ-Z1bc6Jp8aay4GtwlIFdYroNc5zTlNLgy1VcGdRCcZRAyrfE3Xm0yLDOcPNy75D8q63oFHKt3fs8-u1IURnulU0ZyGo434pX3d4ZRfUZnzu8tY8Wo=&c=J6XKcrYqGUApQ8YxyO_BkXq9xz8CNSOcJrgUksg_Oc0S3d3IVjQOfw==&ch=XyAM5LloeHbfaVSCbkT3btrTS-DL3SjsZlG3g786uB8a-ZxPYNPp5Q==) or on the image below.
---
| [ ](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=00189o3l3SpJOG1EE9yPEsJIkH9PTHOSsOfGxLpfYxSqxjT-eHOJux1W-eJbualm9jXXvyTYZto1GXrpsQT0AERVqhiVZ-Z1bc6Jp8aay4GtwlIFdYroNc5zTlNLgy1VcGdRCcZRAyrfE3Xm0yLDOcPNy75D8q63oFHKt3fs8-u1IURnulU0ZyGo434pX3d4ZRfUZnzu8tY8Wo=&c=J6XKcrYqGUApQ8YxyO_BkXq9xz8CNSOcJrgUksg_Oc0S3d3IVjQOfw==&ch=XyAM5LloeHbfaVSCbkT3btrTS-DL3SjsZlG3g786uB8a-ZxPYNPp5Q==)
---
| I always come away from conversations with Dr. McDonald having learned something. I hope you'll take a moment to listen to his unique perspective on the importance of mask-wearing social distancing, and more. As a pediatrician, he's also got a great way of making complex ideas easy to understand -- this might be a good video to watch with any children in your life who have questions about why we have to take precautions.
I hope this interview answers some of the questions you might have about the current trends. I'll be back on TV at 1 p.m. tomorrow to go over the weekly data, what it means, and what we're doing to keep Rhode Islanders safe and healthy.
-Gina Raimondo Governor
P.S.: Information is our greatest weapon in the fight against COVID-19. subject: don't wait
disclaimer_text: Paid for and Authorized by Debbie Wasserman Schultz for Congress
body:
I know you're getting a lot of emails from my team but it's only because this is the most important election we've ever faced.

Winning Florida is the best thing we can do to send Trump packing and my Flip Florida Fund is dedicated to turning out Democratic voters over the next few weeks.

But we need your help. We have $2,515 left to raise and we're relying on grassroots supporters like you.

**Contribute to our Flip Florida Fund right away:** [**https://secure.debbiewassermanschultz.com/october-2020**](https://secure.debbiewassermanschultz.%3D%3D/?g=J5_lAvNIB05ZAYO50yUzJOA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dws-october20?amount=10&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=34223&city=Englewood&state=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=schultz&utm_content=1+-+httpssecuredebbiewassermanschultzcomocto&utm_campaign=DWS_EM_FR_LO_201020_1_6&source=DWS_EM_FR_LO_201020_1_6&refcode=DWS_EM_FR_LO_201020_1_6")

Thanks for everything,

Debbie

name: =?utf-8?Q?Dani?=
subject: We need healthcare and we need it NOW
body:
The President’s comments regarding Dr. Anthony Fauci this week were insulting and disrespectful and failed to give appropriate credence to the health | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/168ef3b9cfed/we-need-healthcare-and-we-need-it-now?e=140a9b81e7)
---
| |
---
| |
#
The President’s comments regarding Dr. Anthony Fauci this week were insulting and disrespectful and failed to give appropriate credence to the healthcare and economic crises that his inaction regarding the pandemic has exacerbated.

To call the country’s leading public health expert an “idiot” is to undermine confidence in his counsel and mislead the public, yet again, during a critical moment when the American people need real leadership.

**There are more than 5 million people in this country who have lost their health insurance as a direct result of becoming unemployed due to the pandemic.** While the Trump administration and his enablers like Rep. Adam Kinzinger are quietly trying to dismantle healthcare for millions of struggling people, candidates like me are fighting to rebuild, to restore health insurance for people who’ve lost it, and to make life-saving care more accessible and affordable for everyone.

**It’s more critical than ever to elect champions for affordable healthcare.** More than 200,000 people have died and millions more now have what is likely to be a pre-existing condition.

[Can you make a donation today to help us get our message of increasing access to healthcare to every voter in this district?](https://daniforillinois.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=16d8d19eb3a417b5b09061c0d&id=b44939568d&e=140a9b81e7)

Thanks,
Dani

name: =?utf-8?Q?Team=20Dani?=
subject: Volunteers needed for Election Day!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Dani for Illinois
body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/20b8280b99ea/volunteers-needed-for-election-day?e=140a9b81e7)
---
| |
---
| |
#
Hello, #TeamDani volunteers!

Wow. We are almost there. Just 2 weeks to go until Election Day when we unseat Adam Kinzinger and flip IL-16!

We are in need of Election Day volunteers to make phone calls to last-minute voters, and pass out literature at polling places (100 feet away, of course). Calling and passing out lit on Election Day are**the last opportunities we will have to reach voters before they vote!** These tasks will be crucial to us finishing strong.

You can [sign up here to volunteer for us on Election Day!](https://daniforillinois.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=16d8d19eb3a417b5b09061c0d&id=c8a71a8e9e&e=140a9b81e7)

Thank you for your support and your tireless work in this fight. We wouldn't be in this position to win this race without you.

Team Dani
---

name: Lindsey Graham
subject: They are mad because we’re about to #FillTheSeat
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Team Graham, Inc
body:
I can’t wait to vote to confirm Judge Amy Coney Barrett to the Supreme Court. I can't wait to vote to confirm Judge Amy Coney Barrett to the Supreme Court. |
---

Peter - The liberal mob is back.

It started with protesters screaming, blaring horns, and pounding on my door at my house in Washington because I dared to say that the Senate should do something that has been done many times before: _confirm a Supreme Court justice in an election year._

Now, far-left liberal activists are at it again - but this time they're accosting me at the airport. _**[Take a look:](http://links.defenddjt.com/u/click?_t=fdbe24553aaa4172b98a2d6c8d833036&_m=56d524850181412b9338e871a294d6f4&_e=zQtetLqKxGyEq_OPDs3f7xOz_F_aFhjhDpwsvpz1Uuv-YoTD7amP49qfPZUKzqiEj0zMuwba2YFbDqZHKABZclawc0_e_LxzkvWuPrRRB2doZAKBX00znqej79F8B2aa2toYo2gyy38iccSH-va2GsokO4_WFFYROOd0z2Y2aI0SQVPqKzaNAeaXeRz2dNEHPD3oSSvG1Spe33aMFLavGrdKEAqihH57oGYeSF-jmUB6kf-6rQg3mnR9d9u3yhkzGhEL4xnwdofa7zGaFVA_5jyhW-G1x-ONlRn2EOFvvWmFQiWCU0P4zmScWUoMI-I2UshwUB6tGiuC1Z2YnygQRYJrxAwpn9f6ZPxdS1Dt2KQCxDXJNOblXiRFySFxy4IUVu5U9mCI20hph_O4ERVY_g%3D%3D)**_

[ ](http://links.defenddjt.com/u/click?_t=fdbe24553aaa4172b98a2d6c8d833036&_m=56d524850181412b9338e871a294d6f4&_e=zQtetLqKxGyEq_OPDs3f7xOz_F_aFhjhDpwsvpz1Uuv-YoTD7amP49qfPZUKzqiEj0zMuwba2YFbDqZHKABZclawc0_e_LxzkvWuPrRRB2doZAKBX00znqej79F8B2aa2toYo2gyy38iccSH-va2GsokO4_WFFYROOd0z2Y2aI0SQVPqKzaNAeaXeRz2dNEHNSEhEuGeq3Mbhyy37mIw0gTPBQs2vEo5DsJGlaU9UxlexBVWEfbng9XKBDI2pUVgF0vs4CfhSoscTdhTGqkzQMUrlDZQcUkwGn-lFsdiPGni3N6g7anIucT4bHytA4Sa29lyiRTbh7dN7ar_d7YGRjvy7xH6y_Nd55AQg3S8LV5ZtjErHBUbi5YaPI-zC-hGpvyoixg3trS2bLCRqEGpRQ%3D%3D)
I'll repeat what I told these protesters:

**I'm enthusiastically going to vote for Judge Amy Coney Barrett.**
**Peter, you know how the Left operates.** They are mad because President Trump has nominated a highly qualified judge in Amy Coney Barrett. They know they can't attack her merits as a judge, so they are calling her “racist.”

| [**STAND WITH ME AGAINST THE LIBERAL MOB**](http://links.defenddjt.com/u/click?_t=fdbe24553aaa4172b98a2d6c8d833036&_m=56d524850181412b9338e871a294d6f4&_e=zQtetLqKxGyEq_OPDs3f7xOz_F_aFhjhDpwsvpz1Uuv-YoTD7amP49qfPZUKzqiEj0zMuwba2YFbDqZHKABZclawc0_e_LxzkvWuPrRRB2doZAKBX00znqej79F8B2aa2toYo2gyy38iccSH-va2GsokO4_WFFYROOd0z2Y2aI0SQVPqKzaNAeaXeRz2dNEH4XshpZkV8ioW21fYJVjl32tpjxFaSc6PdKKWpnZVsuZxhACbnZBhxuKcnDDeHRwSM0Wajwq_y4ksG4FnrZ08OhQpHa7L3ps3RDInopVf77NoiySEkt3WSMu5VShHiZw9u4QwDU_K9S7rocjxYvt9MoOWIeQ814DDWafeBk7xW0uiFAZszdb0JrHOhQexXV7isUb5LDWF66NZxLnLv6_DVQ%3D%3D)
---

They don't scare me - I've faced worse adversaries. The Left only looks to intimidate and silence us.

**[Peter, don't let that happen.](http://links.defenddjt.com/u/click?_t=fdbe24553aaa4172b98a2d6c8d833036&_m=56d524850181412b9338e871a294d6f4&_e=zQtetLqKxGyEq_OPDs3f7xOz_F_aFhjhDpwsvpz1Uuv-YoTD7amP49qfPZUKzqiEj0zMuwba2YFbDqZHKABZclawc0_e_LxzkvWuPrRRB2doZAKBX00znqej79F8B2aa2toYo2gyy38iccSH-va2GsokO4_WFFYROOd0z2Y2aI0SQVPqKzaNAeaXeRz2dNEH6h2dwzygA-uk-f2z0LZwao150zGhwKccvIOMWwyk1YNj2JaHW1iBaja-npF-EO5_yZWP7Cs9T-ShBTDWFOpQNlbPVhbRpDDqlg-cPHLQFgKxwRVPrRyLqgLUTI4cEHNn3JmzoVcFPew-xDBEgmrXSpW3I-sVQtDlZ6CbAHZTe1wWzvOUgAgOmKCXLpvH_LXiZkH0A4ipWT7_JYS0_nCi4w%3D%3D)** We're in the final 14 days of this campaign, and the Left is raising and spending money like never before.

My opponent is raising millions from the liberal mob to defeat me on November 3rd - with almost half of his donors coming from California, Washington state, New York, Massachusetts, and the DC area.

**[I need to know if you're with me, Peter. name: =?utf-8?Q?Muthoni=20Wambu=20Kraal?=
subject: NEW DNC AD: "Infecting Us"...
body:
| | | |
---
| | | Dear Friends-
The DNC War Room released the new [television ad](https://collegedems.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b3a52587106e5f265f227782b&id=83be529c8c&e=d6c5c7d7ec), “Infecting Us,” that appeared exclusively on [The Rachel Maddow Show](https://collegedems.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b3a52587106e5f265f227782b&id=42b92f765c&e=d6c5c7d7ec). Maddow has praised the ad as being “newsworthy.”
Infections are rising across our country with[ more than 20 states](https://collegedems.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b3a52587106e5f265f227782b&id=82cd3fdf84&e=d6c5c7d7ec) hitting record highs for new cases and[ more than half of states](https://collegedems.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b3a52587106e5f265f227782b&id=c0de6573e9&e=d6c5c7d7ec) in the “red zone” for new cases. Instead of getting the virus under control, Trump is embracing a fringe “[herd immunity](https://collegedems.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b3a52587106e5f265f227782b&id=39f6b24942&e=d6c5c7d7ec)” approach that could cause millions of unnecessary deaths.
Trump is viciously attacking Dr. Fauci and he has sidelined other experts on his coronavirus task force, instead pushing dangerous lies from his unqualified Fox News adviser. More than 1,000 current and former CDC officers have criticized the Trump administration’s response to the pandemic.
So the ad is not an attack on Trump, but a searing assessment of how Trump has failed to put the country’s needs above his own. He has no plans to get his health crisis under control, he continues to hold [superspreader events](https://collegedems.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b3a52587106e5f265f227782b&id=19acc7cd14&e=d6c5c7d7ec), he [walked away from stimulus talks](https://collegedems.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b3a52587106e5f265f227782b&id=28aad73fcf&e=d6c5c7d7ec), and he is responsible for this unprecedented economic calamity.
Instead of working to get relief to Americans struggling through his pandemic crisis and recession, Trump abandoned relief negotiations that would have helped[ small businesses](https://collegedems.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b3a52587106e5f265f227782b&id=39e9400923&e=d6c5c7d7ec), schools, struggling families, and unemployed workers — and saved hundreds of thousands of jobs. Trump admitted he is delaying relief to working Americans for political reasons. And Trump’s chief economic adviser admitted Trump is rushing a Supreme Court confirmation instead of getting relief for working Americans.
With just 14 days until Election Day, I ask that you share this short ad across your social networks. Yours in the Fight, Mũthoni
###
---
|
---
|
---
| FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE October 19, 2020
NEW DNC AD: INFECTING US
The DNC War Room released a new [television ad](https://collegedems.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b3a52587106e5f265f227782b&id=d7c53e154c&e=d6c5c7d7ec) today, “Infecting Us,” that hits Trump for holding in-person superspreader campaign rallies that threaten to worsen the spread of coronavirus in states across the country instead of coming up with a plan to slow the spread of the virus and save lives.
“Across the country, Americans are suffering as coronavirus cases surge for a third time — but to Trump, it’s as if the pandemic doesn’t exist,” said DNC War Room Spokesperson Sarah Peck. “Every day, more and more families lose their livelihoods or a loved one because of Trump’s failure to combat COVID, and yet he’s dancing at his superspreader events instead of making a plan to contain the spread. The American people want a president who will protect us from the coronavirus, not one whose reckless behavior threatens to infect even more of us.”
---

name: =?utf-8?Q?The=20White=20House?=
subject: The blue-collar presidency
body:
President Trump is on his way to Pennsylvania, one of many states where this Administration’s blue-collar, middle-class agenda is... | | | | [ ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=6431c7fa62&e=3ee4985eea)
---
| The White House • October 20, 2020
---
| | |
# The blue-collar **presidency**

**President Trump** is on his way to Pennsylvania, one of many states where this Administration’s blue-collar, middle-class agenda is making a difference.

**Before China** and the World Health Organization [**allowed Coronavirus to spread**](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=629a6c2c48&e=3ee4985eea) across the globe—a fact Democrats and liberal media outlets continue to ignore for partisan political reasons—America was in the midst of a massive blue-collar boom.

**Wages rose** , inequality fell, and the unemployment rate dipped to a 50-year low.

**In fact,** according to a [**report earlier this year**](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=865001ac78&e=3ee4985eea), since President Trump took office:
* **Wage growth for workers** has outpaced wage growth for managers.

* **Wage growth** **for those without a bachelor’s degree** has outpaced wage growth for those with a bachelor’s degree or higher.

* **Wage growth** **for lower-income people** —those at the 10th percentile of the income distribution—has outpaced wage growth for wealthier Americans.

* **Average real household income** hit a record high in 2019, while poverty rates hit a record low.

**That’s no accident**. President Trump’s economic agenda is tailor-made to rebuild our great American middle class, transferring power from white-collar professionals to workers, small businesses, manufacturers, and others once left behind by globalization.

**It’s about more than** cutting taxes and growing our economy—although both are important. It’s about [**eliminating unnecessary degree requirements**](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=73a5fc9d2f&e=3ee4985eea) that help the privileged but hurt skilled workers. It’s about ending overregulation that creates jobs for lawyers but [**kills jobs for manufacturers**](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=b9b666c3a0&e=3ee4985eea) and energy producers. It’s about fixing trade deals that boost multinational corporations but [**ship jobs to China and Mexico**](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=f2c3b10290&e=3ee4985eea).

**President Trump is fighting** for the forgotten Americans once sidelined by our country’s own politicians, both Democrat and Republican. Today, these politicians are at it again, calling for endless lockdowns and blaming fellow Americans for a pandemic that started in China that has already infected over 40 million people globally.

**Meanwhile, President Trump** restricted travel from China, held the global health bureaucracy accountable, signed direct stimulus relief into law, and orchestrated a historic nationwide effort to produce masks, ventilators, and—one day soon—a vaccine.

**Now, the President is leading** a Great American Comeback that has seen over 1.4 million manufacturing and construction jobs return in just the past five months alone.

**Our political class today** spends too much time trying to impress one another and too little time working for you. Fortunately, under President Trump, their unchecked power is shrinking—while the power of blue-collar, working Americans grows each day.

**📖 **[**_President Trump’s Plan for Pennsylvania: All Job Creation is Local_**](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=a8f30d02ec&e=3ee4985eea)

**📖**[**MORE: Incomes hit record high and poverty hit record low in 2019**](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=413706afac&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
|
