name: Steve Chabot Press
subject: WEB AD: SCHRODER REPEATEDLY LECTURES OH-01 VOTERS “NOTHING ELSE MATTERS” BUT HER FAR-LEFT CLIMATE AGENDA, JOB-CRUSHING GREEN NEW DEAL
body:
Kate Schroder Expected to Put Extreme Policies On Display Again in Third Debate for Ohio’s First Congressional District
No images? [Click here](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-e-jujyirz-kujkulhluu-b/) [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jujyirz-kujkulhluu-r/) **WEB AD: SCHRODER REPEATEDLY LECTURES OH-01 VOTERS "NOTHING ELSE MATTERS" BUT HER FAR-LEFT CLIMATE AGENDA, JOB-CRUSHING GREEN NEW DEAL** _Kate Schroder Expected to Put Extreme Policies On Display Again in Third Debate for Ohio 's First Congressional District_ **FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE** October 20, 2020Contact: Jon ConradiEmail: [jconradi@fp1strategies.com](mailto:jconradi@fp1strategies.com)CINCINNATI -- Chabot for Congress released a new [web ad](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jujyirz-kujkulhluu-y/) Tuesday highlighting how Kate Schroder has repeatedly lectured OH-01 voters during a pandemic that "nothing else matters" except her far-left climate agenda, including the socialist Green New Deal. The next debate for the first congressional district is Tuesday evening, hosted by WLWT."Socialist Squad Schroder has repeatedly lectured OH-01 voters that 'nothing else matters' except her far-left climate agenda, including the job-crushing Green New Deal," said Chabot for Congress spokesman Jon Conradi. "Schroder has consistently doubled-down on the claim, even while Ohio families, small businesses and health care workers battle a pandemic and unprecedented economic challenges.""Schroder can be expected to double down on her ludicrously out-of-touch claim again in the debate tonight," Conradi continued. "Schroder's extreme agenda places her more in line with AOC and the Socialist Squad in Washington than with the hardworking people of Cincinnati, Hamilton County and Warren County."Watch the web ad, "Lecture," [HERE](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jujyirz-kujkulhluu-j/).**SCHRODER 'S "NOTHING ELSE MATTERS" BACKGROUND****In the first two back-to-back debates for Ohio 's first congressional district, Kate Schroder doubled-down on claims that "nothing else matters" except a far-left climate agenda. ****Cincinnati Enquirer Debate, 10/8/20** "When she said 'nothing else is going to matter,' she said she was referring to the importance of addressing climate change. 'If we don't address climate change, none of us will be here,' Schroder said." (Cincinnati Enquirer, [Steve Chabot goes after Kate Schroder on climate change, Green New Deal in Enquirer debate](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jujyirz-kujkulhluu-t/), 10/8/20)**Local 12, Cincinnati Chamber, Cincinnati Business Courier Debate, 10/7/20** "'If we don't address climate change, nothing else will matter because if we don't have our climate, our world, our globe, none of us will be here. It's a huge issue in this community,' Schroder replied." (Local 12, [Ohio 1st Congressional District candidates face off in Local 12 debate](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jujyirz-kujkulhluu-i/), 10/7/20)**Kate Schroder Twitter, 10/7/20** "... if we don't address climate change, nothing else matters..." (Kate Schroder [Twitter](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jujyirz-kujkulhluu-d/), 10/7/20) **This is not new. Schroder has consistently claimed that "nothing else matters" other a far-left climate agenda throughout the course of her entire campaign:**_Schroder: "Climate to me is the existential crisis facing our country and our world. So, all these other issues we are talking about are not going to matter at all if we continue on this path. Like, none of us are gonna be here, so we have to address it. And I do feel very strongly that we have to move to net zero emissions by 2050 and put a price on carbon." -- (Kate Schroder, Bold New Democracy: Conversations with Kate and Nikki, Urban Artifact, 2/18/20)_**Including vocally supporting the extreme Green New Deal put forward by New York Congresswoman Alexandria Ocasio Cortez, that would upend the economy, eliminate millions of jobs, cost every American home $70,000 in its first year and cost $93 trillion over ten years:**_Forum Attendee: "Would you support, probably, the Green New Deal?"__Schroder: "Oh yeah"__Forum Attendee: "Yeah?"__Schroder: "Yeah... yeah, I mean I think, I think there are so many things for me it's like what do we have the political will to move on with that. I mean nothing else is going to matter." _(Kate Schroder, OH-01 Candidates Night with the League of Women Voters & Warren County Democratic Party, 400 Justice Dr, Lebanon, OH 45036, 2/19/20, [Link](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jujyirz-kujkulhluu-h/)) ### | [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jujyirz-kujkulhluu-k/)| [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jujyirz-kujkulhluu-u/)| [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jujyirz-kujkulhluu-o/)
---|---|---
Chabot for Congress, P.O. Box 54461, Cincinnati, OH 45254
You are receiving this email because of your connection to our cause. If you receive this email in error, please use the unsubscribe link below and remove yourself from future mailings.
